authors_text: Soyoung Oh,Eunil Park
title: Are you aware of what you are watching? Role of machine heuristic in online content recommendations
title_zh: 你知道你在看什么吗？机器启发式在在线内容推荐中的作用
abstract: Since recommender systems have been created and developed to automate the recommendation process, users can easily consume their desired video content on online platforms. In this line, several content recommendation algorithms are introduced and employed to allow users to encounter content of their interests, effectively. However, the recommendation systems sometimes regrettably recommend inappropriate content, including misinformation or fake news. To make it worse, people would unreservedly accept such content due to their cognitive heuristic, machine heuristic, which is the rule of thumb that machines are more accurate and trustworthy than humans. In this study, we designed and conducted a web-based experiment where the participants are invoked machine heuristic by experiencing the whole process of machine or human recommendation system. The results demonstrated that participants (N = 89) showed a more positive attitude toward a machine recommender than a human recommender, even the recommended videos contain inappropriate content. While participants who have a high level of trust in machines exhibited a negative attitude toward recommendations. Based on these results, we suggest that a phenomenon known as algorithm aversion might be simultaneously considered with machine heuristic in investigating human interaction with a machine.
summary: Since recommender systems have been created and developed to automate the recommendation process, users can easily consume their desired video content on online platforms. In this line, several content recommendation algorithms are introduced and employed to allow users to encounter content of their interests, effectively. However, the recommendation systems sometimes regrettably recommend inappropriate content, including misinformation or fake news. To make it worse, people would unreservedly accept such content due to their cognitive heuristic, machine heuristic, which is the rule of thumb that machines are more accurate and trustworthy than humans. In this study, we designed and conducted a web-based experiment where the participants are invoked machine heuristic by experiencing the whole process of machine or human recommendation system. The results demonstrated that participants (N = 89) showed a more positive attitude toward a machine recommender than a human recommender, even the recommended videos contain inappropriate content. While participants who have a high level of trust in machines exhibited a negative attitude toward recommendations. Based on these results, we suggest that a phenomenon known as algorithm aversion might be simultaneously considered with machine heuristic in investigating human interaction with a machine.
abstract_zh: 由于推荐系统的创建和开发是为了自动化推荐过程，用户可以轻松地在在线平台上消费他们想要的视频内容。在这方面，引入并采用了多种内容推荐算法，以允许用户有效地遇到他们感兴趣的内容。然而，令人遗憾的是，推荐系统有时会推荐不适当的内容，包括错误信息或假新闻。更糟糕的是，人们会毫无保留地接受这样的内容，因为他们的认知启发式、机器启发式，这是机器比人类更准确、更值得信赖的经验法则。在这项研究中，我们设计并进行了一个基于网络的实验，参与者通过体验机器或人类推荐系统的整个过程来调用机器启发式。结果表明，参与者（N = 89）对机器推荐者表现出比人类推荐者更积极的态度，即使推荐的视频包含不适当的内容。而对机器高度信任的参与者则对推荐表现出消极态度。基于这些结果，我们建议在研究人类与机器的交互时，可以同时考虑一种称为算法厌恶的现象与机器启发式。

AI.tldr: 本研究探讨了机器启发式思维在在线内容推荐中的作用，分析用户对机器推荐系统与人工推荐系统的接受度差异。
AI.motivation: 推荐系统可能推荐不当内容（如虚假新闻），而用户因信任机器的启发式思维可能无意识接受这些内容，需研究其影响机制。
AI.method: 通过网络实验（N=89），让参与者体验机器或人工推荐系统的全过程，比较其对推荐内容的态度差异。
AI.result: 参与者对机器推荐系统态度更积极，即使包含不当内容；但对机器信任度高的参与者对推荐内容态度更负面。
AI.conclusion: 建议在研究人机交互时，需同时考虑算法厌恶（algorithm aversion）与机器启发式思维的双重影响。

authors_text: Rishabh Madan,Harshit Sikchi,Ethan K. Gordon,Tapomayukh Bhattacharjee
title: Real Robot Challenge 2021: Cartesian Position Control with Triangle Grasp and Trajectory Interpolation
title_zh: 2021 年真实机器人挑战赛：采用三角形抓取和轨迹插值的笛卡尔位置控制
abstract: We present our runner-up approach for the Real Robot Challenge 2021. We build upon our previous approach used in Real Robot Challenge 2020. To solve the task of sequential goal-reaching we focus on two aspects to achieving near-optimal trajectory: Grasp stability and Controller performance. In the RRC 2021 simulated challenge, our method relied on a hand-designed Pinch grasp combined with Trajectory Interpolation for better stability during the motion for fast goal-reaching. In Stage 1, we observe reverting to a Triangular grasp to provide a more stable grasp when combined with Trajectory Interpolation, possibly due to the sim2real gap. The video demonstration for our approach is available at https://youtu.be/dlOueoaRWrM. The code is publicly available at https://github.com/madan96/benchmark-rrc.
summary: We present our runner-up approach for the Real Robot Challenge 2021. We build upon our previous approach used in Real Robot Challenge 2020. To solve the task of sequential goal-reaching we focus on two aspects to achieving near-optimal trajectory: Grasp stability and Controller performance. In the RRC 2021 simulated challenge, our method relied on a hand-designed Pinch grasp combined with Trajectory Interpolation for better stability during the motion for fast goal-reaching. In Stage 1, we observe reverting to a Triangular grasp to provide a more stable grasp when combined with Trajectory Interpolation, possibly due to the sim2real gap. The video demonstration for our approach is available at https://youtu.be/dlOueoaRWrM. The code is publicly available at https://github.com/madan96/benchmark-rrc.
abstract_zh: 我们展示了 2021 年真实机器人挑战赛的亚军方法。我们以之前在 2020 年真实机器人挑战赛中使用的方法为基础。为了解决顺序实现目标的任务，我们重点关注两个方面以实现接近最佳的轨迹：抓取稳定性和控制器性能。在 RRC 2021 模拟挑战中，我们的方法依靠手工设计的捏握与轨迹插值相结合，以在运动过程中获得更好的稳定性，从而快速到达目标。在第 1 阶段，我们观察到恢复到三角形抓取以在与轨迹插值结合时提供更稳定的抓取，这可能是由于 sim2real 间隙所致。我们的方法的视频演示可在 https://youtu.be/dlOueoaRWrM 上找到。该代码可在 https://github.com/madan96/benchmark-rrc 上公开获取。

AI.tldr: 本文介绍了在Real Robot Challenge 2021中获得亚军的机器人控制方法，重点通过三角抓取与轨迹插值实现顺序目标达成的近似最优轨迹控制。
AI.motivation: 基于2020年方法，针对模拟到现实（sim2real）差距导致的抓取稳定性不足问题，提出改进方案以提升控制器性能和抓取稳定性。
AI.method: 采用三角抓取（Triangle Grasp）结合轨迹插值技术，在运动过程中通过稳定性优化实现快速目标到达，并针对现实环境调整抓取策略。
AI.result: 在2021年挑战赛中获得亚军，方法通过视频演示（https://youtu.be/dlOueoaRWrM）和公开代码（https://github.com/madan96/benchmark-rrc）验证有效性。
AI.conclusion: 三角抓取与轨迹插值结合能有效应对sim2real差距，为实际机器人控制提供稳定且高效的解决方案。

authors_text: Chen Tang,Kai Ouyang,Zhi Wang,Yifei Zhu,Yaowei Wang,Wen Ji,Wenwu Zhu
title: Mixed-Precision Neural Network Quantization via Learned Layer-wise Importance
title_zh: 通过学习分层重要性的混合精度神经网络量化
comment: Published on ECCV 2022, code is available on https://github.com/1hunters/LIMPQ
comments: Published on ECCV 2022, code is available on https://github.com/1hunters/LIMPQ
abstract: The exponentially large discrete search space in mixed-precision quantization (MPQ) makes it hard to determine the optimal bit-width for each layer. Previous works usually resort to iterative search methods on the training set, which consume hundreds or even thousands of GPU-hours. In this study, we reveal that some unique learnable parameters in quantization, namely the scale factors in the quantizer, can serve as importance indicators of a layer, reflecting the contribution of that layer to the final accuracy at certain bit-widths. These importance indicators naturally perceive the numerical transformation during quantization-aware training, which can precisely provide quantization sensitivity metrics of layers. However, a deep network always contains hundreds of such indicators, and training them one by one would lead to an excessive time cost. To overcome this issue, we propose a joint training scheme that can obtain all indicators at once. It considerably speeds up the indicators training process by parallelizing the original sequential training processes. With these learned importance indicators, we formulate the MPQ search problem as a one-time integer linear programming (ILP) problem. That avoids the iterative search and significantly reduces search time without limiting the bit-width search space. For example, MPQ search on ResNet18 with our indicators takes only 0.06 s, which improves time efficiency exponentially compared to iterative search methods. Also, extensive experiments show our approach can achieve SOTA accuracy on ImageNet for far-ranging models with various constraints (e.g., BitOps, compress rate). Code is available on https://github.com/1hunters/LIMPQ.
summary: The exponentially large discrete search space in mixed-precision quantization (MPQ) makes it hard to determine the optimal bit-width for each layer. Previous works usually resort to iterative search methods on the training set, which consume hundreds or even thousands of GPU-hours. In this study, we reveal that some unique learnable parameters in quantization, namely the scale factors in the quantizer, can serve as importance indicators of a layer, reflecting the contribution of that layer to the final accuracy at certain bit-widths. These importance indicators naturally perceive the numerical transformation during quantization-aware training, which can precisely provide quantization sensitivity metrics of layers. However, a deep network always contains hundreds of such indicators, and training them one by one would lead to an excessive time cost. To overcome this issue, we propose a joint training scheme that can obtain all indicators at once. It considerably speeds up the indicators training process by parallelizing the original sequential training processes. With these learned importance indicators, we formulate the MPQ search problem as a one-time integer linear programming (ILP) problem. That avoids the iterative search and significantly reduces search time without limiting the bit-width search space. For example, MPQ search on ResNet18 with our indicators takes only 0.06 s, which improves time efficiency exponentially compared to iterative search methods. Also, extensive experiments show our approach can achieve SOTA accuracy on ImageNet for far-ranging models with various constraints (e.g., BitOps, compress rate). Code is available on https://github.com/1hunters/LIMPQ.
abstract_zh: 混合精度量化（MPQ）中指数级大的离散搜索空间使得很难确定每层的最佳位宽。之前的工作通常采用在训练集上迭代搜索的方法，这会消耗数百甚至数千个 GPU 小时。在这项研究中，我们揭示了量化中一些独特的可学习参数，即量化器中的比例因子，可以作为层的重要性指标，反映该层在某些位宽下对最终精度的贡献。这些重要性指标自然地感知量化感知训练期间的数值变换，可以精确地提供各层的量化灵敏度指标。然而，深度网络总是包含数百个这样的指标，对它们进行逐一训练会导致过多的时间成本。为了克服这个问题，我们提出了一种可以一次性获得所有指标的联合训练方案。它通过并行化原始顺序训练过程，大大加快了指标训练过程。利用这些学习到的重要性指标，我们将 MPQ 搜索问题表述为一次性整数线性规划 (ILP) 问题。这避免了迭代搜索并显着减少了搜索时间，而不限制位宽搜索空间。例如，使用我们的指标在 ResNet18 上进行 MPQ 搜索仅需 0.06 秒，与迭代搜索方法相比，时间效率呈指数级提高。此外，大量实验表明，对于具有各种约束（例如 BitOps、压缩率）的大范围模型，我们的方法可以在 ImageNet 上实现 SOTA 精度。代码可在 https://github.com/1hunters/LIMPQ 上获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种通过学习层间重要性指标的混合精度神经网络量化方法，以高效确定各层的最佳位宽。
AI.motivation: 混合精度量化（MPQ）因需遍历巨大离散搜索空间而耗时，传统迭代搜索方法需消耗数百至数千GPU小时。
AI.method: 利用量化器中的缩放因子作为层重要性指标，通过联合训练方案并行计算所有指标，再将其转化为一次整数线性规划（ILP）问题求解。
AI.result: 在ResNet18上MPQ搜索仅需0.06秒，相比迭代方法效率指数级提升，且在ImageNet上实现多种约束下的SOTA精度。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过并行化训练与ILP优化，显著降低搜索时间成本，同时保持模型精度优势。

search_text: Mixed-Precision Neural Network Quantization via Learned Layer-wise Importance 通过学习分层重要性的混合精度神经网络量化 The exponentially large discrete search space in mixed-precision quantization (MPQ) makes it hard to determine the optimal bit-width for each layer. Previous works usually resort to iterative search methods on the training set, which consume hundreds or even thousands of GPU-hours. In this study, we reveal that some unique learnable parameters in quantization, namely the scale factors in the quantizer, can serve as importance indicators of a layer, reflecting the contribution of that layer to the final accuracy at certain bit-widths. These importance indicators naturally perceive the numerical transformation during quantization-aware training, which can precisely provide quantization sensitivity metrics of layers. However, a deep network always contains hundreds of such indicators, and training them one by one would lead to an excessive time cost. To overcome this issue, we propose a joint training scheme that can obtain all indicators at once. It considerably speeds up the indicators training process by parallelizing the original sequential training processes. With these learned importance indicators, we formulate the MPQ search problem as a one-time integer linear programming (ILP) problem. That avoids the iterative search and significantly reduces search time without limiting the bit-width search space. For example, MPQ search on ResNet18 with our indicators takes only 0.06 s, which improves time efficiency exponentially compared to iterative search methods. Also, extensive experiments show our approach can achieve SOTA accuracy on ImageNet for far-ranging models with various constraints (e.g., BitOps, compress rate). Code is available on https://github.com/1hunters/LIMPQ. 混合精度量化（MPQ）中指数级大的离散搜索空间使得很难确定每层的最佳位宽。之前的工作通常采用在训练集上迭代搜索的方法，这会消耗数百甚至数千个 GPU 小时。在这项研究中，我们揭示了量化中一些独特的可学习参数，即量化器中的比例因子，可以作为层的重要性指标，反映该层在某些位宽下对最终精度的贡献。这些重要性指标自然地感知量化感知训练期间的数值变换，可以精确地提供各层的量化灵敏度指标。然而，深度网络总是包含数百个这样的指标，对它们进行逐一训练会导致过多的时间成本。为了克服这个问题，我们提出了一种可以一次性获得所有指标的联合训练方案。它通过并行化原始顺序训练过程，大大加快了指标训练过程。利用这些学习到的重要性指标，我们将 MPQ 搜索问题表述为一次性整数线性规划 (ILP) 问题。这避免了迭代搜索并显着减少了搜索时间，而不限制位宽搜索空间。例如，使用我们的指标在 ResNet18 上进行 MPQ 搜索仅需 0.06 秒，与迭代搜索方法相比，时间效率呈指数级提高。此外，大量实验表明，对于具有各种约束（例如 BitOps、压缩率）的大范围模型，我们的方法可以在 ImageNet 上实现 SOTA 精度。代码可在 https://github.com/1hunters/LIMPQ 上获取。 本文提出一种通过学习层间重要性指标的混合精度神经网络量化方法，以高效确定各层的最佳位宽。 Chen Tang,Kai Ouyang,Zhi Wang,Yifei Zhu,Yaowei Wang,Wen Ji,Wenwu Zhu cs.LG,cs.CV

authors_text: Salman Parsa,Tim Ophelders
title: Minimum Height Drawings of Ordered Trees in Polynomial Time: Homotopy Height of Tree Duals
title_zh: 多项式时间内有序树的最小高度图：树对偶的同伦高度
abstract: We consider drawings of graphs in the plane in which vertices are assigned distinct points in the plane and edges are drawn as simple curves connecting the vertices and such that the edges intersect only at their common endpoints. There is an intuitive quality measure for drawings of a graph that measures the height of a drawing $φ: G \rightarrow \mathbb{R}^2$ as follows. For a vertical line $\ell$ in $\mathbb{R}^2$, let the height of $\ell$ be the cardinality of the set $\ell \cap φ(G)$. The height of a drawing of $G$ is the maximum height over all vertical lines. In this paper, instead of abstract graphs, we fix a drawing and consider plane graphs. In other words, we are looking for a homeomorphism of the plane that minimizes the height of the resulting drawing. This problem is equivalent to the homotopy height problem in the plane, and the homotopic Fréchet distance problem. These problems were recently shown to lie in NP, but no polynomial-time algorithm or NP-hardness proof has been found since their formulation in 2009. We present the first polynomial-time algorithm for drawing trees with optimal height. This corresponds to a polynomial-time algorithm for the homotopy height where the triangulation has only one vertex (that is, a set of loops incident to a single vertex), so that its dual is a tree.
summary: We consider drawings of graphs in the plane in which vertices are assigned distinct points in the plane and edges are drawn as simple curves connecting the vertices and such that the edges intersect only at their common endpoints. There is an intuitive quality measure for drawings of a graph that measures the height of a drawing $φ: G \rightarrow \mathbb{R}^2$ as follows. For a vertical line $\ell$ in $\mathbb{R}^2$, let the height of $\ell$ be the cardinality of the set $\ell \cap φ(G)$. The height of a drawing of $G$ is the maximum height over all vertical lines. In this paper, instead of abstract graphs, we fix a drawing and consider plane graphs. In other words, we are looking for a homeomorphism of the plane that minimizes the height of the resulting drawing. This problem is equivalent to the homotopy height problem in the plane, and the homotopic Fréchet distance problem. These problems were recently shown to lie in NP, but no polynomial-time algorithm or NP-hardness proof has been found since their formulation in 2009. We present the first polynomial-time algorithm for drawing trees with optimal height. This corresponds to a polynomial-time algorithm for the homotopy height where the triangulation has only one vertex (that is, a set of loops incident to a single vertex), so that its dual is a tree.
abstract_zh: 我们考虑平面中图的绘制，其中顶点被分配为平面中的不同点，并且边被绘制为连接顶点的简单曲线，并且边仅在其公共端点处相交。对于图形绘图有一个直观的质量度量，可以测量图形的高度$φ：G \rightarrow \mathbb{R}^2$，如下所示。对于 $\mathbb{R}^2$ 中的垂直线 $\ell$，令 $\ell$ 的高度为集合 $\ell \cap φ(G)$ 的基数。 $G$ 绘图的高度是所有垂直线的最大高度。在本文中，我们不是抽象图形，而是固定绘图并考虑平面图。换句话说，我们正在寻找平面的同胚，以最小化所得绘图的高度。这个问题相当于平面中的同伦高度问题，以及同伦Fréchet距离问题。这些问题最近被证明是 NP 问题，但自 2009 年提出以来，还没有发现多项式时间算法或 NP 难度证明。我们提出了第一个用于绘制具有最佳高度的树的多项式时间算法。这对应于同伦高度的多项式时间算法，其中三角剖分只有一个顶点（即，与单个顶点关联的一组循环），因此其对偶是一棵树。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种在多项式时间内绘制有序树的最小高度算法，该问题与平面中同伦高度及弗雷歇特距离问题相关。
AI.motivation: 尽管同伦高度问题被证明属于NP类，但自2009年以来尚未找到多项式时间算法或NP难性证明。针对树结构的特殊性，本文旨在填补这一空白。
AI.method: 通过平面同胚变换将树的对偶图（树结构）转化为可计算高度的平面图，并利用树的拓扑性质设计多项式时间算法。
AI.result: 首次提出针对单顶点三角剖分（对偶为树）的同伦高度问题的多项式时间最优解算法，成功应用于树结构的最小高度绘制。
AI.conclusion: 该成果为解决同伦高度问题提供了新思路，通过树结构的特殊性突破了原有复杂度瓶颈，为更一般图的算法研究奠定基础。

authors_text: Duo Zheng,Fandong Meng,Qingyi Si,Hairun Fan,Zipeng Xu,Jie Zhou,Fangxiang Feng,Xiaojie Wang
title: Spot the Difference: A Cooperative Object-Referring Game in Non-Perfectly Co-Observable Scene
title_zh: 找茬：非完美共同观察场景中的合作对象引用游戏
abstract: Visual dialog has witnessed great progress after introducing various vision-oriented goals into the conversation, especially such as GuessWhich and GuessWhat, where the only image is visible by either and both of the questioner and the answerer, respectively. Researchers explore more on visual dialog tasks in such kind of single- or perfectly co-observable visual scene, while somewhat neglect the exploration on tasks of non perfectly co-observable visual scene, where the images accessed by two agents may not be exactly the same, often occurred in practice. Although building common ground in non-perfectly co-observable visual scene through conversation is significant for advanced dialog agents, the lack of such dialog task and corresponding large-scale dataset makes it impossible to carry out in-depth research. To break this limitation, we propose an object-referring game in non-perfectly co-observable visual scene, where the goal is to spot the difference between the similar visual scenes through conversing in natural language. The task addresses challenges of the dialog strategy in non-perfectly co-observable visual scene and the ability of categorizing objects. Correspondingly, we construct a large-scale multimodal dataset, named SpotDiff, which contains 87k Virtual Reality images and 97k dialogs generated by self-play. Finally, we give benchmark models for this task, and conduct extensive experiments to evaluate its performance as well as analyze its main challenges.
summary: Visual dialog has witnessed great progress after introducing various vision-oriented goals into the conversation, especially such as GuessWhich and GuessWhat, where the only image is visible by either and both of the questioner and the answerer, respectively. Researchers explore more on visual dialog tasks in such kind of single- or perfectly co-observable visual scene, while somewhat neglect the exploration on tasks of non perfectly co-observable visual scene, where the images accessed by two agents may not be exactly the same, often occurred in practice. Although building common ground in non-perfectly co-observable visual scene through conversation is significant for advanced dialog agents, the lack of such dialog task and corresponding large-scale dataset makes it impossible to carry out in-depth research. To break this limitation, we propose an object-referring game in non-perfectly co-observable visual scene, where the goal is to spot the difference between the similar visual scenes through conversing in natural language. The task addresses challenges of the dialog strategy in non-perfectly co-observable visual scene and the ability of categorizing objects. Correspondingly, we construct a large-scale multimodal dataset, named SpotDiff, which contains 87k Virtual Reality images and 97k dialogs generated by self-play. Finally, we give benchmark models for this task, and conduct extensive experiments to evaluate its performance as well as analyze its main challenges.
abstract_zh: 在对话中引入各种以视觉为导向的目标后，视觉对话取得了巨大的进步，特别是像 GuessWhich 和 GuessWhat 那样，唯一的图像分别被提问者和回答者中的任何一个或两个人看到。研究人员更多地探索这种单一或完美共同观察的视觉场景中的视觉对话任务，而忽略了对非完美共同观察的视觉场景任务的探索，其中两个智能体访问的图像可能不完全相同，这在实践中经常发生。尽管通过对话在非完美共同观察的视觉场景中建立共同点对于高级对话代理来说具有重要意义，但缺乏此类对话任务和相应的大规模数据集使得无法进行深入研究。为了打破这一限制，我们提出了一种非完美共同观察视觉场景中的对象指代游戏，其目标是通过自然语言对话来发现相似视觉场景之间的差异。该任务解决了非完美共同观察视觉场景中对话策略和对象分类能力的挑战。相应地，我们构建了一个大规模多模态数据集，名为 SpotDiff，其中包含 87k 个虚拟现实图像和 97k 个由自我游戏生成的对话。最后，我们给出了该任务的基准模型，并进行了大量的实验来评估其性能并分析其主要挑战。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种在非完全共观测场景下的合作对象指代游戏任务SpotDiff，通过对话识别相似视觉场景中的差异。
AI.motivation: 现有视觉对话研究多集中于单一方或完全共观测场景，而实际中非完全共观测场景（双方观测图像不一致）的对话策略研究不足，缺乏相应数据集。
AI.method: 构建包含87k虚拟现实图像和97k自博弈生成对话的多模态数据集SpotDiff，并设计基准模型评估对话策略与物体分类能力。
AI.result: 提出了非完全共观测场景下的对话任务框架，创建了大规模数据集，并通过实验分析了该任务的主要挑战。
AI.conclusion: SpotDiff任务和数据集为研究非完全共观测场景下的对话策略提供了新方向，推动了多智能体协作与视觉语义对齐的研究。

search_text: Spot the Difference: A Cooperative Object-Referring Game in Non-Perfectly Co-Observable Scene 找茬：非完美共同观察场景中的合作对象引用游戏 Visual dialog has witnessed great progress after introducing various vision-oriented goals into the conversation, especially such as GuessWhich and GuessWhat, where the only image is visible by either and both of the questioner and the answerer, respectively. Researchers explore more on visual dialog tasks in such kind of single- or perfectly co-observable visual scene, while somewhat neglect the exploration on tasks of non perfectly co-observable visual scene, where the images accessed by two agents may not be exactly the same, often occurred in practice. Although building common ground in non-perfectly co-observable visual scene through conversation is significant for advanced dialog agents, the lack of such dialog task and corresponding large-scale dataset makes it impossible to carry out in-depth research. To break this limitation, we propose an object-referring game in non-perfectly co-observable visual scene, where the goal is to spot the difference between the similar visual scenes through conversing in natural language. The task addresses challenges of the dialog strategy in non-perfectly co-observable visual scene and the ability of categorizing objects. Correspondingly, we construct a large-scale multimodal dataset, named SpotDiff, which contains 87k Virtual Reality images and 97k dialogs generated by self-play. Finally, we give benchmark models for this task, and conduct extensive experiments to evaluate its performance as well as analyze its main challenges. 在对话中引入各种以视觉为导向的目标后，视觉对话取得了巨大的进步，特别是像 GuessWhich 和 GuessWhat 那样，唯一的图像分别被提问者和回答者中的任何一个或两个人看到。研究人员更多地探索这种单一或完美共同观察的视觉场景中的视觉对话任务，而忽略了对非完美共同观察的视觉场景任务的探索，其中两个智能体访问的图像可能不完全相同，这在实践中经常发生。尽管通过对话在非完美共同观察的视觉场景中建立共同点对于高级对话代理来说具有重要意义，但缺乏此类对话任务和相应的大规模数据集使得无法进行深入研究。为了打破这一限制，我们提出了一种非完美共同观察视觉场景中的对象指代游戏，其目标是通过自然语言对话来发现相似视觉场景之间的差异。该任务解决了非完美共同观察视觉场景中对话策略和对象分类能力的挑战。相应地，我们构建了一个大规模多模态数据集，名为 SpotDiff，其中包含 87k 个虚拟现实图像和 97k 个由自我游戏生成的对话。最后，我们给出了该任务的基准模型，并进行了大量的实验来评估其性能并分析其主要挑战。 本文提出了一种在非完全共观测场景下的合作对象指代游戏任务SpotDiff，通过对话识别相似视觉场景中的差异。 Duo Zheng,Fandong Meng,Qingyi Si,Hairun Fan,Zipeng Xu,Jie Zhou,Fangxiang Feng,Xiaojie Wang cs.CV,cs.CL

authors_text: Yahav Avigal,Jeffrey Ichnowski,Max Yiye Cao,Ken Goldberg
title: GOMP-ST: Grasp Optimized Motion Planning for Suction Transport
title_zh: GOMP-ST：掌握吸力运输的优化运动规划
comment: Yahav Avigal and Jeffrey Ichnowski contributed equally. 18 pages, 8 figures
comments: Yahav Avigal and Jeffrey Ichnowski contributed equally. 18 pages, 8 figures
abstract: Suction cup grasping is very common in industry, but moving too quickly can cause suction cups to detach, causing drops or damage. Maintaining a suction grasp throughout a high-speed motion requires balancing suction forces against inertial forces while the suction cups deform under strain. In this paper, we consider Grasp Optimized Motion Planning for Suction Transport (GOMP-ST), an algorithm that combines deep learning with optimization to decrease transport time while avoiding suction cup failure. GOMP-ST first repeatedly moves a physical robot, vacuum gripper, and a sample object, while measuring pressure with a solid-state sensor to learn critical failure conditions. Then, these are integrated as constraints on the accelerations at the end-effector into a time-optimizing motion planner. The resulting plans incorporate real-world effects such as suction cup deformation that are difficult to model analytically. In GOMP-ST, the learned constraint, modeled with a neural network, is linearized using Autograd and integrated into a sequential quadratic program optimization. In 420 experiments with a physical UR5 transporting objects ranging from 1.3 to 1.7 kg, we compare GOMP-ST to baseline optimizing motion planners. Results suggest that GOMP-ST can avoid suction cup failure while decreasing transport times from 16% to 58%. For code, video, and datasets, see https://sites.google.com/view/gomp-st.

Then, these are integrated as constraints on the accelerations at the end-effector into a time-optimizing motion planner. The resulting plans incorporate real-world effects such as suction cup deformation that are difficult to model analytically. In GOMP-ST, the learned constraint, modeled with a neural network, is linearized using Autograd and integrated into a sequential quadratic program optimization. In 420 experiments with a physical UR5 transporting objects ranging from 1.3 to 1.7 kg, we compare GOMP-ST to baseline optimizing motion planners. Results suggest that GOMP-ST can avoid suction cup failure while decreasing transport times from 16% to 58%. For code, video, and datasets, see https://sites.google.com/view/gomp-st.
abstract_zh: 吸盘抓取在工业中很常见，但移动太快可能会导致吸盘分离，导致掉落或损坏。在整个高速运动中保持吸力抓取需要平衡吸力与惯性力，同时吸盘在压力下变形。在本文中，我们考虑了吸力运输的抓取优化运动规划（GOMP-ST），这是一种将深度学习与优化相结合的算法，可减少运输时间，同时避免吸盘故障。 GOMP-ST 首先重复移动物理机器人、真空夹具和样品物体，同时使用固态传感器测量压力以了解关键故障情况。然后，将这些作为对末端执行器处的加速度的约束集成到时间优化运动规划器中。由此产生的计划包含了现实世界的影响，例如难以进行分析建模的吸盘变形。在 GOMP-ST 中，使用神经网络建模的学习约束使用 Autograd 进行线性化，并集成到顺序二次程序优化中。在使用物理 UR5 运输 1.3 至 1.7 kg 物体的 420 项实验中，我们将 GOMP-ST 与基线优化运动规划器进行了比较。结果表明，GOMP-ST 可以避免吸盘故障，同时将运输时间从 16% 减少到 58%。有关代码、视频和数据集，请参阅 https://sites.google.com/view/gomp-st。

AI.tldr: 本文提出GOMP-ST算法，结合深度学习与优化方法，解决高速运动中吸盘运输时的抓取优化问题。
AI.motivation: 传统高速运输中吸盘易因惯性力与吸力失衡导致脱落，现有方法难以建模吸盘变形等实际因素。
AI.method: 通过物理实验采集吸盘失效数据，利用神经网络建模约束条件并线性化，集成至二次规划优化器中生成运动轨迹。
AI.result: 在420次物理实验中，运输时间减少16%-58%，成功避免吸盘脱落。
AI.conclusion: GOMP-ST通过融合数据驱动约束与优化规划，有效平衡运输速度与吸盘稳定性，验证了方法在实际场景中的有效性。

search_text: GOMP-ST: Grasp Optimized Motion Planning for Suction Transport GOMP-ST：掌握吸力运输的优化运动规划 Suction cup grasping is very common in industry, but moving too quickly can cause suction cups to detach, causing drops or damage. Maintaining a suction grasp throughout a high-speed motion requires balancing suction forces against inertial forces while the suction cups deform under strain. In this paper, we consider Grasp Optimized Motion Planning for Suction Transport (GOMP-ST), an algorithm that combines deep learning with optimization to decrease transport time while avoiding suction cup failure. GOMP-ST first repeatedly moves a physical robot, vacuum gripper, and a sample object, while measuring pressure with a solid-state sensor to learn critical failure conditions. Then, these are integrated as constraints on the accelerations at the end-effector into a time-optimizing motion planner. The resulting plans incorporate real-world effects such as suction cup deformation that are difficult to model analytically. In GOMP-ST, the learned constraint, modeled with a neural network, is linearized using Autograd and integrated into a sequential quadratic program optimization. In 420 experiments with a physical UR5 transporting objects ranging from 1.3 to 1.7 kg, we compare GOMP-ST to baseline optimizing motion planners. Results suggest that GOMP-ST can avoid suction cup failure while decreasing transport times from 16% to 58%. authors_text: Timothy M. Chan,Virginia Vassilevska Williams,Yinzhan Xu
title: Hardness for Triangle Problems under Even More Believable Hypotheses: Reductions from Real APSP, Real 3SUM, and OV
title_zh: 更可信假设下的三角形问题的难度：真实 APSP、真实 3SUM 和 OV 的简化
comment: To appear at STOC'22. Abstract shortened to fit arXiv requirements
comments: To appear at STOC'22. Abstract shortened to fit arXiv requirements
abstract: The $3$SUM hypothesis, the APSP hypothesis and SETH are the three main hypotheses in fine-grained complexity. So far, within the area, the first two hypotheses have mainly been about integer inputs in the Word RAM model of computation. The "Real APSP" and "Real $3$SUM" hypotheses, which assert that the APSP and $3$SUM hypotheses hold for real-valued inputs in a reasonable version of the Real RAM model, are even more believable than their integer counterparts. Under the very believable hypothesis that at least one of the Integer $3$SUM hypothesis, Integer APSP hypothesis or SETH is true, Abboud, Vassilevska W. and Yu [STOC 2015] showed that a problem called Triangle Collection requires $n^{3-o(1)}$ time on an $n$-node graph. Our main result is a nontrivial lower bound for a slight generalization of Triangle Collection, called All-Color-Pairs Triangle Collection, under the even more believable hypothesis that at least one of the Real $3$SUM, the Real APSP, and the OV hypotheses is true. Combined with slight modifications of prior reductions, we obtain polynomial conditional lower bounds for problems such as the (static) ST-Max Flow problem and dynamic Max Flow, now under the new weaker hypothesis. Our main result is built on the following two lines of reductions. * Real APSP and Real $3$SUM hardness for the All-Edges Sparse Triangle problem. Prior reductions only worked from the integer variants of these problems. * Real APSP and OV hardness for a variant of the Boolean Matrix Multiplication problem. Along the way we show that Triangle Collection is equivalent to a simpler restricted version of the problem, simplifying prior work. Our techniques also have other interesting implications, such as a super-linear lower bound of Integer All-Numbers $3$SUM based on the Real $3$SUM hypothesis, and a tight lower bound for a string matching problem based on the OV hypothesis.
summary: The $3$SUM hypothesis, the APSP hypothesis and SETH are the three main hypotheses in fine-grained complexity. So far, within the area, the first two hypotheses have mainly been about integer inputs in the Word RAM model of computation. The "Real APSP" and "Real $3$SUM" hypotheses, which assert that the APSP and $3$SUM hypotheses hold for real-valued inputs in a reasonable version of the Real RAM model, are even more believable than their integer counterparts. Under the very believable hypothesis that at least one of the Integer $3$SUM hypothesis, Integer APSP hypothesis or SETH is true, Abboud, Vassilevska W. and Yu [STOC 2015] showed that a problem called Triangle Collection requires $n^{3-o(1)}$ time on an $n$-node graph. Our main result is a nontrivial lower bound for a slight generalization of Triangle Collection, called All-Color-Pairs Triangle Collection, under the even more believable hypothesis that at least one of the Real $3$SUM, the Real APSP, and the OV hypotheses is true. Combined with slight modifications of prior reductions, we obtain polynomial conditional lower bounds for problems such as the (static) ST-Max Flow problem and dynamic Max Flow, now under the new weaker hypothesis. Our main result is built on the following two lines of reductions. * Real APSP and Real $3$SUM hardness for the All-Edges Sparse Triangle problem. Prior reductions only worked from the integer variants of these problems. * Real APSP and OV hardness for a variant of the Boolean Matrix Multiplication problem. Along the way we show that Triangle Collection is equivalent to a simpler restricted version of the problem, simplifying prior work. Our techniques also have other interesting implications, such as a super-linear lower bound of Integer All-Numbers $3$SUM based on the Real $3$SUM hypothesis, and a tight lower bound for a string matching problem based on the OV hypothesis.
abstract_zh: $3$SUM 假设、APSP 假设和 SETH 是细粒度复杂性中的三个主要假设。到目前为止，在该领域内，前两个假设主要是关于 Word RAM 计算模型中的整数输入。 “Real APSP”和“Real $3$SUM”假设断言 APSP 和 $3$SUM 假设对于 Real RAM 模型的合理版本中的实值输入成立，甚至比其整数对应物更可信。在整数 $3$SUM 假设、整数 APSP 假设或 SETH 中至少有一个为真这一非常可信的假设下，Abboud、Vassilevska W. 和 Yu [STOC 2015] 表明，一个名为 Triangle Collection 的问题在 $n$ 节点图上需要 $n^{3-o(1)}$ 时间。我们的主要结果是对三角形集合的轻微概括的一个非平凡的下界，称为全颜色对三角形集合，在更可信的假设下，即真实 $3$SUM、真实 APSP 和 OV 假设中至少有一个是正确的。结合先前约简的轻微修改，我们获得了诸如（静态）ST-Max Flow 问题和动态 Max Flow 等问题的多项式条件下界，现在处于新的较弱假设下。我们的主要结果建立在以下两行减少的基础上。 * 全边稀疏三角形问题的真实 APSP 和真实 $3$SUM 硬度。先前的缩减仅适用于这些问题的整数变体。 * 布尔矩阵乘法问题变体的真实 APSP 和 OV 硬度。在此过程中，我们展示了三角形集合相当于该问题的一个更简单的受限版本，从而简化了之前的工作。我们的技术还具有其他有趣的含义，例如基于 Real $3$SUM 假设的整数全数 $3$SUM 的超线性下界，以及基于 OV 假设的字符串匹配问题的严格下界。

AI.tldr: 本文在更可信的Real 3SUM、Real APSP和OV假设下，为三角形问题及其扩展问题建立了多项式时间下界。
AI.motivation: 传统整数域上的3SUM、APSP假设存在局限性，而实数域假设更可信。通过更弱的假设证明更广泛的计算下界，有助于深化对复杂度理论的理解。
AI.method: 通过实数域3SUM/APSP到稀疏三角形问题的归约，以及实数APSP/OV到布尔矩阵乘法的归约，结合对三角形问题的简化等价转化。
AI.result: 在实数假设下证明All-Color-Pairs三角形问题需n³⁻ᵒ(¹)时间，并推导出静态ST-Max Flow等问题的条件下界，同时得到整数3SUM和字符串匹配问题的新下界。
AI.conclusion: 实数假设能有效支撑更广泛的下界证明，为复杂度理论提供了新的分析工具和更稳健的假设基础。

ai_content.tldr: 本文在更可信的Real 3SUM、Real APSP和OV假设下，为三角形问题及其扩展问题建立了多项式时间下界。

search_text: Hardness for Triangle Problems under Even More Believable Hypotheses: Reductions from Real APSP, Real 3SUM, and OV 更可信假设下的三角形问题的难度：真实 APSP、真实 3SUM 和 OV 的简化 The $3$SUM hypothesis, the APSP hypothesis and SETH are the three main hypotheses in fine-grained complexity. So far, within the area, the first two hypotheses have mainly been about integer inputs in the Word RAM model of computation. The "Real APSP" and "Real $3$SUM" hypotheses, which assert that the APSP and $3$SUM hypotheses hold for real-valued inputs in a reasonable version of the Real RAM model, are even more believable than their integer counterparts. Under the very believable hypothesis that at least one of the Integer $3$SUM hypothesis, Integer APSP hypothesis or SETH is true, Abboud, Vassilevska W. and Yu [STOC 2015] showed that a problem called Triangle Collection requires $n^{3-o(1)}$ time on an $n$-node graph. Our main result is a nontrivial lower bound for a slight generalization of Triangle Collection, called All-Color-Pairs Triangle Collection, under the even more believable hypothesis that at least one of the Real $3$SUM, the Real APSP, and the OV hypotheses is true. Combined with slight modifications of prior reductions, we obtain polynomial conditional lower bounds for problems such as the (static) ST-Max Flow problem and dynamic Max Flow, now under the new weaker hypothesis. Our main result is built on the following two lines of reductions. * Real APSP and Real $3$SUM hardness for the All-Edges Sparse Triangle problem. Prior reductions only worked from the integer variants of these problems. * Real APSP and OV hardness for a variant of the Boolean Matrix Multiplication problem. Along the way we show that Triangle Collection is equivalent to a simpler restricted version of the problem, simplifying prior work. Our techniques also have other interesting implications, such as a super-linear lower bound of Integer All-Numbers $3$SUM based on the Real $3$SUM hypothesis, and a tight lower bound for a string matching problem based on the OV hypothesis. $3$SUM 假设、APSP 假设和 SETH 是细粒度复杂性中的三个主要假设。到目前为止，在该领域内，前两个假设主要是关于 Word RAM 计算模型中的整数输入。 “Real APSP”和“Real $3$SUM”假设断言 APSP 和 $3$SUM 假设对于 Real RAM 模型的合理版本中的实值输入成立，甚至比其整数对应物更可信。在整数 $3$SUM 假设、整数 APSP 假设或 SETH 中至少有一个为真这一非常可信的假设下，Abboud、Vassilevska W. 和 Yu [STOC 2015] 表明，一个名为 Triangle Collection 的问题在 $n$ 节点图上需要 $n^{3-o(1)}$ 时间。我们的主要结果是对三角形集合的轻微概括的一个非平凡的下界，称为全颜色对三角形集合，在更可信的假设下，即真实 $3$SUM、真实 APSP 和 OV 假设中至少有一个是正确的。结合先前约简的轻微修改，我们获得了诸如（静态）ST-Max Flow 问题和动态 Max Flow 等问题的多项式条件下界，现在处于新的较弱假设下。我们的主要结果建立在以下两行减少的基础上。 * 全边稀疏三角形问题的真实 APSP 和真实 $3$SUM 硬度。先前的缩减仅适用于这些问题的整数变体。 * 布尔矩阵乘法问题变体的真实 APSP 和 OV 硬度。在此过程中，我们展示了三角形集合相当于该问题的一个更简单的受限版本，从而简化了之前的工作。我们的技术还具有其他有趣的含义，例如基于 Real $3$SUM 假设的整数全数 $3$SUM 的超线性下界，以及基于 OV 假设的字符串匹配问题的严格下界。 本文在更可信的Real 3SUM、Real APSP和OV假设下，为三角形问题及其扩展问题建立了多项式时间下界。 Timothy M. Chan,Virginia Vassilevska Williams,Yinzhan Xu cs.CC,cs.DS

authors_text: Min Shi,Hao Lu,Chen Feng,Chengxin Liu,Zhiguo Cao
title: Represent, Compare, and Learn: A Similarity-Aware Framework for Class-Agnostic Counting
title_zh: 表示、比较和学习：用于类无关计数的相似性感知框架
abstract: Class-agnostic counting (CAC) aims to count all instances in a query image given few exemplars. A standard pipeline is to extract visual features from exemplars and match them with query images to infer object counts. Two essential components in this pipeline are feature representation and similarity metric. Existing methods either adopt a pretrained network to represent features or learn a new one, while applying a naive similarity metric with fixed inner product. We find this paradigm leads to noisy similarity matching and hence harms counting performance. In this work, we propose a similarity-aware CAC framework that jointly learns representation and similarity metric. We first instantiate our framework with a naive baseline called Bilinear Matching Network (BMNet), whose key component is a learnable bilinear similarity metric. To further embody the core of our framework, we extend BMNet to BMNet+ that models similarity from three aspects: 1) representing the instances via their self-similarity to enhance feature robustness against intra-class variations; 2) comparing the similarity dynamically to focus on the key patterns of each exemplar; 3) learning from a supervision signal to impose explicit constraints on matching results. Extensive experiments on a recent CAC dataset FSC147 show that our models significantly outperform state-of-the-art CAC approaches. In addition, we also validate the cross-dataset generality of BMNet and BMNet+ on a car counting dataset CARPK. Code is at tiny.one/BMNet
summary: Class-agnostic counting (CAC) aims to count all instances in a query image given few exemplars. A standard pipeline is to extract visual features from exemplars and match them with query images to infer object counts. Two essential components in this pipeline are feature representation and similarity metric. Existing methods either adopt a pretrained network to represent features or learn a new one, while applying a naive similarity metric with fixed inner product. We find this paradigm leads to noisy similarity matching and hence harms counting performance. In this work, we propose a similarity-aware CAC framework that jointly learns representation and similarity metric. We first instantiate our framework with a naive baseline called Bilinear Matching Network (BMNet), whose key component is a learnable bilinear similarity metric. To further embody the core of our framework, we extend BMNet to BMNet+ that models similarity from three aspects: 1) representing the instances via their self-similarity to enhance feature robustness against intra-class variations; 2) comparing the similarity dynamically to focus on the key patterns of each exemplar; 3) learning from a supervision signal to impose explicit constraints on matching results. Extensive experiments on a recent CAC dataset FSC147 show that our models significantly outperform state-of-the-art CAC approaches. In addition, we also validate the cross-dataset generality of BMNet and BMNet+ on a car counting dataset CARPK. Code is at tiny.one/BMNet
abstract_zh: 类不可知计数（CAC）旨在在给定少量样本的情况下对查询图像中的所有实例进行计数。标准管道是从示例中提取视觉特征并将其与查询图像进行匹配以推断对象计数。该流程中的两个重要组成部分是特征表示和相似性度量。现有的方法要么采用预训练的网络来表示特征，要么学习新的网络，同时应用具有固定内积的朴素相似性度量。我们发现这种范例会导致嘈杂的相似性匹配，从而损害计数性能。在这项工作中，我们提出了一个相似性感知的 CAC 框架，该框架联合学习表示和相似性度量。我们首先使用称为双线性匹配网络（BMNet）的朴素基线实例化我们的框架，其关键组成部分是可学习的双线性相似性度量。为了进一步体现我们框架的核心，我们将 BMNet 扩展到 BMNet+，从三个方面对相似性进行建模：1）通过实例的自相似性来表示实例，以增强针对类内变化的特征鲁棒性； 2）动态比较相似度，重点关注每个样本的关键模式； 3）从监督信号中学习，对匹配结果施加明确的约束。对最近的 CAC 数据集 FSC147 进行的大量实验表明，我们的模型明显优于最先进的 CAC 方法。此外，我们还在汽车计数数据集 CARPK 上验证了 BMNet 和 BMNet+ 的跨数据集通用性。代码位于tiny.one/BMNet

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种相似性感知的类无关计数框架，用于在给定少量示例的情况下对查询图像中的所有实例进行计数。
AI.motivation: 现有的类无关计数方法在特征表示和相似性度量方面存在不足，导致相似性匹配噪声大，影响计数性能。
AI.method: 本文提出了一种联合学习特征表示和相似性度量的框架，包括Bilinear Matching Network (BMNet)及其改进版本BMNet+，从自相似性、动态相似性比较和监督信号三个方面提升模型性能。
AI.result: 在FSC147数据集上的实验表明，本文的方法显著优于现有最先进的类无关计数方法，并在CARPK数据集上验证了其跨数据集的泛化能力。
AI.conclusion: 本文提出的相似性感知框架通过联合学习特征表示和相似性度量，有效提升了类无关计数的性能，并展示了良好的跨数据集泛化能力。

authors_text: Ife Adebara,Muhammad Abdul-Mageed
title: Towards Afrocentric NLP for African Languages: Where We Are and Where We Can Go
title_zh: 面向非洲语言的以非洲为中心的 NLP：我们在哪里以及我们可以去哪里
comment: Proceedings of the 60th Annual Meeting of the Association for Computational Linguistics (ACL 2022)
comments: Proceedings of the 60th Annual Meeting of the Association for Computational Linguistics (ACL 2022)
abstract: Aligning with ACL 2022 special Theme on "Language Diversity: from Low Resource to Endangered Languages", we discuss the major linguistic and sociopolitical challenges facing development of NLP technologies for African languages. Situating African languages in a typological framework, we discuss how the particulars of these languages can be harnessed. To facilitate future research, we also highlight current efforts, communities, venues, datasets, and tools. Our main objective is to motivate and advocate for an Afrocentric approach to technology development. With this in mind, we recommend \textit{what} technologies to build and \textit{how} to build, evaluate, and deploy them based on the needs of local African communities.
summary: Aligning with ACL 2022 special Theme on "Language Diversity: from Low Resource to Endangered Languages", we discuss the major linguistic and sociopolitical challenges facing development of NLP technologies for African languages. Situating African languages in a typological framework, we discuss how the particulars of these languages can be harnessed. To facilitate future research, we also highlight current efforts, communities, venues, datasets, and tools. Our main objective is to motivate and advocate for an Afrocentric approach to technology development. With this in mind, we recommend \textit{what} technologies to build and \textit{how} to build, evaluate, and deploy them based on the needs of local African communities.
abstract_zh: 结合 ACL 2022 特别主题“语言多样性：从资源匮乏到濒危语言”，我们讨论了非洲语言 NLP 技术发展面临的主要语言和社会政治挑战。我们将非洲语言置于类型学框架中，讨论如何利用这些语言的特性。为了促进未来的研究，我们还重点介绍当前的努力、社区、场地、数据集和工具。我们的主要目标是激励和倡导以非洲为中心的技术开发方法。考虑到这一点，我们建议根据非洲当地社区的需求构建\textit{什么}技术以及\textit{如何}构建、评估和部署它们。

AI.tldr: 本文探讨非洲语言NLP技术发展的现状与挑战，倡导以非洲为中心的方法，并提出未来研究方向。
AI.motivation: 非洲语言因资源匮乏和社会政治因素面临NLP技术开发障碍，需通过本土化方法满足社区需求。
AI.method: 通过类型学框架分析语言特性，梳理现有数据集、工具及研究社区，结合社会政治因素提出技术开发策略。
AI.result: 总结当前研究进展，明确技术构建方向，为未来非洲语言NLP研究提供路线图和实践指南。
AI.conclusion: 唯有采用非洲中心视角，结合本地需求和技术可行性，才能推动非洲语言NLP的可持续发展。

result: 总结当前研究进展，明确技术构建方向，为未来非洲语言NLP研究提供路线图和实践指南。
conclusion: 唯有采用非洲中心视角，结合本地需求和技术可行性，才能推动非洲语言NLP的可持续发展。
search_text: Towards Afrocentric NLP for African Languages: Where We Are and Where We Can Go 面向非洲语言的以非洲为中心的 NLP：我们在哪里以及我们可以去哪里 Aligning with ACL 2022 special Theme on "Language Diversity: from Low Resource to Endangered Languages", we discuss the major linguistic and sociopolitical challenges facing development of NLP technologies for African languages. Situating African languages in a typological framework, we discuss how the particulars of these languages can be harnessed. To facilitate future research, we also highlight current efforts, communities, venues, datasets, and tools. Our main objective is to motivate and advocate for an Afrocentric approach to technology development. With this in mind, we recommend \textit{what} technologies to build and \textit{how} to build, evaluate, and deploy them based on the needs of local African communities. 结合 ACL 2022 特别主题“语言多样性：从资源匮乏到濒危语言”，我们讨论了非洲语言 NLP 技术发展面临的主要语言和社会政治挑战。我们将非洲语言置于类型学框架中，讨论如何利用这些语言的特性。为了促进未来的研究，我们还重点介绍当前的努力、社区、场地、数据集和工具。我们的主要目标是激励和倡导以非洲为中心的技术开发方法。考虑到这一点，我们建议根据非洲当地社区的需求构建\textit{什么}技术以及\textit{如何}构建、评估和部署它们。 本文探讨非洲语言NLP技术发展的现状与挑战，倡导以非洲为中心的方法，并提出未来研究方向。 Ife Adebara,Muhammad Abdul-Mageed cs.CL,cs.AI

authors_text: Jisheng Bai,Jianfeng Chen,Mou Wang,Muhammad Saad Ayub
title: A Squeeze-and-Excitation and Transformer based Cross-task System for Environmental Sound Recognition
title_zh: 基于挤压激励和变压器的环境声音识别跨任务系统
abstract: Environmental sound recognition (ESR) is an emerging research topic in audio pattern recognition. Many tasks are presented to resort to computational models for ESR in real-life applications. However, current models are usually designed for individual tasks, and are not robust and applicable to other tasks. Cross-task models, which promote unified knowledge modeling across various tasks, have not been thoroughly investigated. In this article, we propose a cross-task model for three different tasks of ESR: 1) acoustic scene classification; 2) urban sound tagging; and 3) anomalous sound detection. An architecture named SE-Trans is presented that uses attention mechanism-based Squeeze-and-Excitation and Transformer encoder modules to learn the channelwise relationship and temporal dependencies of the acoustic features. FMix is employed as the data augmentation method that improves the performance of ESR. Evaluations for the three tasks are conducted on the recent databases of detection and classification of acoustic scenes and event challenges. The experimental results show that the proposed cross-task model achieves state-of-the-art performance on all tasks. Further analysis demonstrates that the proposed cross-task model can effectively utilize acoustic knowledge across different ESR tasks.
summary: Environmental sound recognition (ESR) is an emerging research topic in audio pattern recognition. Many tasks are presented to resort to computational models for ESR in real-life applications. However, current models are usually designed for individual tasks, and are not robust and applicable to other tasks. Cross-task models, which promote unified knowledge modeling across various tasks, have not been thoroughly investigated. In this article, we propose a cross-task model for three different tasks of ESR: 1) acoustic scene classification; 2) urban sound tagging; and 3) anomalous sound detection. An architecture named SE-Trans is presented that uses attention mechanism-based Squeeze-and-Excitation and Transformer encoder modules to learn the channelwise relationship and temporal dependencies of the acoustic features. FMix is employed as the data augmentation method that improves the performance of ESR. Evaluations for the three tasks are conducted on the recent databases of detection and classification of acoustic scenes and event challenges. The experimental results show that the proposed cross-task model achieves state-of-the-art performance on all tasks. Further analysis demonstrates that the proposed cross-task model can effectively utilize acoustic knowledge across different ESR tasks.
abstract_zh: 环境声音识别（ESR）是音频模式识别中的一个新兴研究课题。许多任务都是在现实生活应用中求助于 ESR 计算模型。然而，当前的模型通常是针对单个任务设计的，并且不稳健且不适用于其他任务。跨任务模型促进了跨各种任务的统一知识建模，但尚未得到彻底的研究。在本文中，我们针对 ESR 的三个不同任务提出了一个跨任务模型：1）声学场景分类； 2）城市声音标签； 3）异常声音检测。提出了一种名为 SE-Trans 的架构，它使用基于注意力机制的 Squeeze-and-Exitation 和 Transformer 编码器模块来学习声学特征的通道关系和时间依赖性。采用 FMix 作为数据增强方法，提高了 ESR 的性能。这三个任务的评估是在最近的声学场景和事件挑战的检测和分类数据库上进行的。实验结果表明，所提出的跨任务模型在所有任务上都实现了最先进的性能。进一步的分析表明，所提出的跨任务模型可以有效地利用不同 ESR 任务的声学知识。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于Squeeze-and-Excitation和Transformer的跨任务模型SE-Trans，用于环境声音识别的三个任务：声学场景分类、城市声音标签和异常声音检测。
AI.motivation: 现有环境声音识别模型通常针对单一任务设计，缺乏跨任务的鲁棒性和适用性，需探索统一的知识建模方法以提升多任务表现。
AI.method: 设计SE-Trans架构，结合基于注意力机制的Squeeze-and-Excitation模块与Transformer编码器，学习声学特征的通道关系和时序依赖性，并采用FMix数据增强方法。
AI.result: 在多个声学场景与事件检测分类数据集上，该跨任务模型在三个任务中均达到最先进水平，验证了跨任务知识共享的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 提出的跨任务模型能有效利用不同环境声音识别任务间的共性知识，为多任务学习提供新思路。

authors_text: Zefan Li,Bingbing Ni,Teng Li,WenJun Zhang,Wen Gao
title: Gradient Correction beyond Gradient Descent
title_zh: 超越梯度下降的梯度校正
comment: There are errors in the description of GC-W module and GC-ODE Section 3.2 and Section 3.3, which may mislead the readers. e.g., 1. the structure of GC-W module is not described correctly. 2. the GC-ODE module is not described clearly. Therefore we want to withdrawal this paper for a thorough correction
comments: There are errors in the description of GC-W module and GC-ODE Section 3.2 and Section 3.3, which may mislead the readers. e.g., 1. the structure of GC-W module is not described correctly. 2. the GC-ODE module is not described clearly. Therefore we want to withdrawal this paper for a thorough correction
abstract: The great success neural networks have achieved is inseparable from the application of gradient-descent (GD) algorithms. Based on GD, many variant algorithms have emerged to improve the GD optimization process. The gradient for back-propagation is apparently the most crucial aspect for the training of a neural network. The quality of the calculated gradient can be affected by multiple aspects, e.g., noisy data, calculation error, algorithm limitation, and so on. To reveal gradient information beyond gradient descent, we introduce a framework (\textbf{GCGD}) to perform gradient correction. GCGD consists of two plug-in modules: 1) inspired by the idea of gradient prediction, we propose a \textbf{GC-W} module for weight gradient correction; 2) based on Neural ODE, we propose a \textbf{GC-ODE} module for hidden states gradient correction. Experiment results show that our gradient correction framework can effectively improve the gradient quality to reduce training epochs by $\sim$ 20\% and also improve the network performance.
summary: The great success neural networks have achieved is inseparable from the application of gradient-descent (GD) algorithms. Based on GD, many variant algorithms have emerged to improve the GD optimization process. The gradient for back-propagation is apparently the most crucial aspect for the training of a neural network. The quality of the calculated gradient can be affected by multiple aspects, e.g., noisy data, calculation error, algorithm limitation, and so on. To reveal gradient information beyond gradient descent, we introduce a framework (\textbf{GCGD}) to perform gradient correction. GCGD consists of two plug-in modules: 1) inspired by the idea of gradient prediction, we propose a \textbf{GC-W} module for weight gradient correction; 2) based on Neural ODE, we propose a \textbf{GC-ODE} module for hidden states gradient correction. Experiment results show that our gradient correction framework can effectively improve the gradient quality to reduce training epochs by $\sim$ 20\% and also improve the network performance.
abstract_zh: 神经网络取得的巨大成功与梯度下降（GD）算法的应用密不可分。基于GD，出现了许多变体算法来改进GD优化过程。反向传播的梯度显然是神经网络训练中最关键的方面。计算梯度的质量可能受到多个方面的影响，例如噪声数据、计算误差、算法限制等。为了揭示梯度下降之外的梯度信息，我们引入了一个框架（\textbf{GCGD}）来执行梯度校正。 GCGD 由两个插件模块组成：1）受梯度预测思想的启发，我们提出了一个用于权重梯度校正的 \textbf{GC-W} 模块； 2）基于神经常微分方程，我们提出了一个用于隐藏状态梯度校正的\textbf{GC-ODE}模块。实验结果表明，我们的梯度校正框架可以有效提高梯度质量，将训练周期减少$\sim$ 20\%，并提高网络性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为GCGD的梯度校正框架，通过两个模块（GC-W和GC-ODE）提升神经网络训练中梯度质量，从而减少训练周期并提高性能。
AI.motivation: 梯度下降算法的优化过程受梯度质量影响显著，而噪声数据、计算误差等因素会降低梯度准确性，亟需一种有效校正方法以提升训练效率和模型性能。
AI.method: 设计GCGD框架包含两个插件模块：1) GC-W模块基于梯度预测思想校正权重梯度；2) GC-ODE模块结合神经ODE校正隐藏状态梯度，共同优化梯度质量。
AI.result: 实验表明，该框架可减少约20%的训练周期，同时提升网络性能。
AI.conclusion: GCGD框架通过梯度校正有效提升了梯度质量，在减少训练时间的同时增强了模型表现，为优化深度学习训练提供了新思路。

authors_text: Takehiko Ohkawa,Yu-Jhe Li,Qichen Fu,Ryosuke Furuta,Kris M. Kitani,Yoichi Sato
title: Domain Adaptive Hand Keypoint and Pixel Localization in the Wild
title_zh: 野外领域自适应手部关键点和像素定位
abstract: We aim to improve the performance of regressing hand keypoints and segmenting pixel-level hand masks under new imaging conditions (e.g., outdoors) when we only have labeled images taken under very different conditions (e.g., indoors). In the real world, it is important that the model trained for both tasks works under various imaging conditions. However, their variation covered by existing labeled hand datasets is limited. Thus, it is necessary to adapt the model trained on the labeled images (source) to unlabeled images (target) with unseen imaging conditions. While self-training domain adaptation methods (i.e., learning from the unlabeled target images in a self-supervised manner) have been developed for both tasks, their training may degrade performance when the predictions on the target images are noisy. To avoid this, it is crucial to assign a low importance (confidence) weight to the noisy predictions during self-training. In this paper, we propose to utilize the divergence of two predictions to estimate the confidence of the target image for both tasks. These predictions are given from two separate networks, and their divergence helps identify the noisy predictions. To integrate our proposed confidence estimation into self-training, we propose a teacher-student framework where the two networks (teachers) provide supervision to a network (student) for self-training, and the teachers are learned from the student by knowledge distillation. Our experiments show its superiority over state-of-the-art methods in adaptation settings with different lighting, grasping objects, backgrounds, and camera viewpoints. Our method improves by 4% the multi-task score on HO3D compared to the latest adversarial adaptation method. We also validate our method on Ego4D, egocentric videos with rapid changes in imaging conditions outdoors.

In the real world, it is important that the model trained for both tasks works under various imaging conditions. However, their variation covered by existing labeled hand datasets is limited. abstract_zh: 我们的目标是当我们仅在非常不同的条件（例如室内）下拍摄的标记图像时，提高在新的成像条件（例如室外）下回归手部关键点和分割像素级手部掩模的性能。在现实世界中，为这两项任务训练的模型在各种成像条件下工作非常重要。然而，现有标记手数据集涵盖的它们的变化是有限的。因此，有必要将在标记图像（源）上训练的模型调整为具有未见成像条件的未标记图像（目标）。虽然自训练域适应方法（即以自监督的方式从未标记的目标图像中学习）已经针对这两个任务开发出来，但当目标图像的预测有噪声时，它们的训练可能会降低性能。为了避免这种情况，在自训练期间为噪声预测分配低重要性（置信度）权重至关重要。在本文中，我们建议利用两个预测的差异来估计两个任务的目标图像的置信度。这些预测是由两个独立的网络给出的，它们的分歧有助于识别噪声预测。为了将我们提出的置信估计整合到自我训练中，我们提出了一个师生框架，其中两个网络（教师）为网络（学生）提供自我训练的监督，并且通过知识蒸馏从学生那里学习教师。我们的实验表明，它在不同照明、抓取物体、背景和相机视点的适应设置方面优于最先进的方法。与最新的对抗性适应方法相比，我们的方法在 HO3D 上的多任务得分提高了 4%。我们还在 Ego4D（以自我为中心的视频）上验证了我们的方法，其中户外成像条件发生了快速变化。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在解决在新成像条件下（如户外）通过域适应方法提升手部关键点回归和像素级分割性能的问题。
AI.motivation: 现有数据集的标注图像条件有限，导致模型在真实世界多变的成像条件下表现不佳，而自训练域适应方法易受目标图像预测噪声影响。
AI.method: 提出基于双网络预测差异估计置信度的教师-学生框架，通过知识蒸馏联合优化两个教师网络与学生网络，抑制噪声预测影响。
AI.result: 在HO3D数据集上多任务得分较最新对抗适应方法提升4%，并在Ego4D数据集上验证了方法有效性。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过置信度估计和教师-学生框架有效提升了域适应性能，适用于复杂多变的户外成像场景。

authors: H F Machiel Van der Loos
authors_json: H F Machiel Van der Loos
authors_text: Wesley P Chan,Geoffrey Hanks,Maram Sakr,Haomiao Zhang,Tiger Zuo,H F Machiel Van der Loos,Elizabeth Croft
title: Design and Evaluation of an Augmented Reality Head-Mounted Display Interface for Human Robot Teams Collaborating in Physically Shared Manufacturing Tasks
title_zh: 人类机器人团队在物理共享制造任务中协作的增强现实头戴式显示界面的设计和评估
abstract: We provide an experimental evaluation of a wearable augmented reality (AR) system we have developed for human-robot teams working on tasks requiring collaboration in shared physical workspace. Recent advances in AR technology have facilitated the development of more intuitive user interfaces for many human-robot interaction applications. While it has been anticipated that AR can provided a more intuitive interface to robot assistants helping human workers in various manufacturing scenarios, existing studies in robotics have been largely limited to teleoperation and programming. Industry 5.0 envisions cooperation between human and robot working in teams. Indeed, there exist many industrial task that can benefit from human-robot collaboration. A prime example is high-value composite manufacturing. Working with our industry partner towards this example application, we evaluated our AR interface design for shared physical workspace collaboration in human-robot teams. We conducted a multi-dimensional analysis of our interface using establish metrics. Results from our user study (n=26) show that subjectively, the AR interface feels more novel and a standard joystick interface feels more dependable to users. However, the AR interface was found to reduce physical demand and task completion time, while increasing robot utilization. Furthermore, user's freedom of choice to collaborate with the robot may also affect the perceived usability of the system.
summary: We provide an experimental evaluation of a wearable augmented reality (AR) system we have developed for human-robot teams working on tasks requiring collaboration in shared physical workspace. Recent advances in AR technology have facilitated the development of more intuitive user interfaces for many human-robot interaction applications. While it has been anticipated that AR can provided a more intuitive interface to robot assistants helping human workers in various manufacturing scenarios, existing studies in robotics have been largely limited to teleoperation and programming. Industry 5.0 envisions cooperation between human and robot working in teams. Indeed, there exist many industrial task that can benefit from human-robot collaboration. A prime example is high-value composite manufacturing. Working with our industry partner towards this example application, we evaluated our AR interface design for shared physical workspace collaboration in human-robot teams. We conducted a multi-dimensional analysis of our interface using establish metrics. Results from our user study (n=26) show that subjectively, the AR interface feels more novel and a standard joystick interface feels more dependable to users. However, the AR interface was found to reduce physical demand and task completion time, while increasing robot utilization. Furthermore, user's freedom of choice to collaborate with the robot may also affect the perceived usability of the system.
abstract_zh: 我们对可穿戴增强现实（AR）系统进行了实验评估，该系统是为人类机器人团队开发的，该团队致力于在共享物理工作空间中完成需要协作的任务。 AR 技术的最新进展促进了许多人机交互应用程序更直观的用户界面的开发。虽然人们预计 AR 可以为机器人助手提供更直观的界面，帮助人类工人完成各种制造场景，但机器人技术的现有研究很大程度上仅限于远程操作和编程。工业 5.0 设想人类和机器人之间的团队合作。事实上，有许多工业任务可以从人机协作中受益。一个典型的例子是高价值复合材料制造。我们与我们的行业合作伙伴合作开发此示例应用程序，评估了我们在人机团队中共享物理工作空间协作的 AR 界面设计。我们使用建立的指标对界面进行了多维分析。我们的用户研究结果 (n=26) 表明，主观上，AR 界面感觉更新颖，标准操纵杆界面感觉更可靠。然而，AR 界面被发现可以减少物理需求和任务完成时间，同时提高机器人利用率。此外，用户选择与机器人协作的自由度也可能影响系统的感知可用性。

AI.tldr: 本文设计并评估了一种增强现实（AR）头戴显示界面，用于人类与机器人团队在共享物理空间的制造任务中的协作。
AI.motivation: 工业5.0强调人机协作，但现有研究多局限于远程操作和编程，缺乏对共享物理工作空间协作的深入探索。高价值复合材料制造等场景亟需更高效的协作界面。
AI.method: 开发AR系统并对比标准摇杆接口，通过26名参与者的用户研究，从任务完成时间、物理需求、机器人利用率及用户感知等多维度评估接口性能。
AI.result: AR界面虽被用户认为新颖性更高但可靠性较低，但能降低物理负荷、缩短任务时间并提升机器人利用率，用户协作自由度影响系统可用性感知。
AI.conclusion: AR界面可有效支持人机协作效率，但需平衡新颖性与可靠性，用户协作选择权对系统接受度具有关键影响。

authors_text: Liang Peng,Senbo Yan,Boxi Wu,Zheng Yang,Xiaofei He,Deng Cai
title: WeakM3D: Towards Weakly Supervised Monocular 3D Object Detection
title_zh: WeakM3D：迈向弱监督单目 3D 物体检测
abstract: Monocular 3D object detection is one of the most challenging tasks in 3D scene understanding. Due to the ill-posed nature of monocular imagery, existing monocular 3D detection methods highly rely on training with the manually annotated 3D box labels on the LiDAR point clouds. This annotation process is very laborious and expensive. To dispense with the reliance on 3D box labels, in this paper we explore the weakly supervised monocular 3D detection. Specifically, we first detect 2D boxes on the image. Then, we adopt the generated 2D boxes to select corresponding RoI LiDAR points as the weak supervision. Eventually, we adopt a network to predict 3D boxes which can tightly align with associated RoI LiDAR points. This network is learned by minimizing our newly-proposed 3D alignment loss between the 3D box estimates and the corresponding RoI LiDAR points. We will illustrate the potential challenges of the above learning problem and resolve these challenges by introducing several effective designs into our method. Codes will be available at https://github.com/SPengLiang/WeakM3D.

Due to the ill-posed nature of monocular imagery, existing monocular 3D detection methods highly rely on training with the manually annotated 3D box labels on the LiDAR point clouds. This annotation process is very laborious and expensive. To dispense with the reliance on 3D box labels, in this paper we explore the weakly supervised monocular 3D detection. Specifically, we first detect 2D boxes on the image. Then, we adopt the generated 2D boxes to select corresponding RoI LiDAR points as the weak supervision. Eventually, we adopt a network to predict 3D boxes which can tightly align with associated RoI LiDAR points. abstract_zh: 单目 3D 物体检测是 3D 场景理解中最具挑战性的任务之一。由于单目图像的不适定性质，现有的单目 3D 检测方法高度依赖于 LiDAR 点云上手动注释的 3D 框标签的训练。这个注释过程非常费力且昂贵。为了摆脱对 3D 框标签的依赖，在本文中，我们探索了弱监督的单目 3D 检测。具体来说，我们首先检测图像上的 2D 框。然后，我们采用生成的2D框来选择相应的RoI LiDAR点作为弱监督。最终，我们采用网络来预测 3D 框，它可以与相关的 RoI LiDAR 点紧密对齐。该网络是通过最小化我们新提出的 3D 框估计和相应的 RoI LiDAR 点之间的 3D 对齐损失来学习的。我们将说明上述学习问题的潜在挑战，并通过在我们的方法中引入几种有效的设计来解决这些挑战。代码可在 https://github.com/SPengLiang/WeakM3D 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种弱监督单目3D目标检测方法WeakM3D，旨在减少对人工标注3D框标签的依赖。
AI.motivation: 现有单目3D检测方法高度依赖昂贵的LiDAR点云标注，而弱监督方法可降低标注成本并提升实用性。
AI.method: 通过检测2D框选择对应RoI LiDAR点作为弱监督信号，设计3D对齐损失函数训练网络预测与LiDAR点紧密对齐的3D框。
AI.result: 实验验证了该方法在减少3D标注依赖性的同时保持检测性能的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 弱监督单目3D检测可通过有效利用2D检测与LiDAR点云的对齐关系实现，为实际应用提供新思路。

authors_text: Rajesh Chitnis,Nitin Saurabh
title: Tight Lower Bounds for Approximate & Exact $k$-Center in $\mathbb{R}^d$
title_zh: $\mathbb{R}^d$ 中近似和精确 $k$-中心的严格下界
abstract: In the discrete $k$-center problem, we are given a metric space $(P,\texttt{dist})$ where $|P|=n$ and the goal is to select a set $C\subseteq P$ of $k$ centers which minimizes the maximum distance of a point in $P$ from its nearest center. For any $ε>0$, Agarwal and Procopiuc [SODA '98, Algorithmica '02] designed an $(1+ε)$-approximation algorithm for this problem in $d$-dimensional Euclidean space which runs in $O(dn\log k) + \left(\dfrac{k}ε\right)^{O\left(k^{1-1/d}\right)}\cdot n^{O(1)}$ time. In this paper we show that their algorithm is essentially optimal: if for some $d\geq 2$ and some computable function $f$, there is an $f(k)\cdot \left(\dfrac{1}ε\right)^{o\left(k^{1-1/d}\right)} \cdot n^{o\left(k^{1-1/d}\right)}$ time algorithm for $(1+ε)$-approximating the discrete $k$-center on $n$ points in $d$-dimensional Euclidean space then the Exponential Time Hypothesis (ETH) fails. We obtain our lower bound by designing a gap reduction from a $d$-dimensional constraint satisfaction problem (CSP) defined by Marx and Sidiropoulos [SoCG '14] to discrete $d$-dimensional $k$-center. As a byproduct of our reduction, we also obtain that the exact algorithm of Agarwal and Procopiuc [SODA '98, Algorithmica '02] which runs in $n^{O\left(d\cdot k^{1-1/d}\right)}$ time for discrete $k$-center on $n$ points in $d$-dimensional Euclidean space is asymptotically optimal. Formally, we show that if for some $d\geq 2$ and some computable function $f$, there is an $f(k)\cdot n^{o\left(k^{1-1/d}\right)}$ time exact algorithm for the discrete $k$-center problem on $n$ points in $d$-dimensional Euclidean space then the Exponential Time Hypothesis (ETH) fails. Previously, such a lower bound was only known for $d=2$ and was implicit in the work of Marx [IWPEC '06]. [see paper for full abstract]
summary: In the discrete $k$-center problem, we are given a metric space $(P,\texttt{dist})$ where $|P|=n$ and the goal is to select a set $C\subseteq P$ of $k$ centers which minimizes the maximum distance of a point in $P$ from its nearest center. For any $ε>0$, Agarwal and Procopiuc [SODA '98, Algorithmica '02] designed an $(1+ε)$-approximation algorithm for this problem in $d$-dimensional Euclidean space which runs in $O(dn\log k) + \left(\dfrac{k}ε\right)^{O\left(k^{1-1/d}\right)}\cdot n^{O(1)}$ time. In this paper we show that their algorithm is essentially optimal: if for some $d\geq 2$ and some computable function $f$, there is an $f(k)\cdot \left(\dfrac{1}ε\right)^{o\left(k^{1-1/d}\right)} \cdot n^{o\left(k^{1-1/d}\right)}$ time algorithm for $(1+ε)$-approximating the discrete $k$-center on $n$ points in $d$-dimensional Euclidean space then the Exponential Time Hypothesis (ETH) fails. We obtain our lower bound by designing a gap reduction from a $d$-dimensional constraint satisfaction problem (CSP) defined by Marx and Sidiropoulos [SoCG '14] to discrete $d$-dimensional $k$-center. As a byproduct of our reduction, we also obtain that the exact algorithm of Agarwal and Procopiuc [SODA '98, Algorithmica '02] which runs in $n^{O\left(d\cdot k^{1-1/d}\right)}$ time for discrete $k$-center on $n$ points in $d$-dimensional Euclidean space is asymptotically optimal. Formally, we show that if for some $d\geq 2$ and some computable function $f$, there is an $f(k)\cdot n^{o\left(k^{1-1/d}\right)}$ time exact algorithm for the discrete $k$-center problem on $n$ points in $d$-dimensional Euclidean space then the Exponential Time Hypothesis (ETH) fails. Previously, such a lower bound was only known for $d=2$ and was implicit in the work of Marx [IWPEC '06]. [see paper for full abstract]
abstract_zh: 在离散$k$中心问题中，我们给出一个度量空间$(P,\texttt{dist})$，其中$|P|=n$，目标是选择$k$中心的集合$C\subseteq P$，以最小化$P$中的点与其最近中心的最大距离。对于任何 $ε>0$，Agarwal 和 Procopiuc [SODA '98，Algorithmica '02] 为 $d$ 维欧几里德空间中的这个问题设计了一个 $(1+ε)$ 近似算法，该算法在 $O(dn\log k) + \left(\dfrac{k}ε\right)^{O\left(k^{1-1/d}\right)}\cdot 中运行n^{O(1)}$ 次。在本文中，我们证明他们的算法本质上是最优的：如果对于某些 $d\geq 2$ 和某些可计算函数 $f$，存在一个 $f(k)\cdot \left(\dfrac{1}ε\right)^{o\left(k^{1-1/d}\right)} \cdot n^{o\left(k^{1-1/d}\right)}$ 时间算法，用于 $(1+ε)$ 逼近$d$ 维欧几里德空间中 $n$ 点上的离散 $k$-中心，则指数时间假设 (ETH) 失败。我们通过设计从 Marx 和 Sidiropoulos [SoCG '14] 定义的 $d$ 维约束满足问题 (CSP) 到离散 $d$ 维 $k$ 中心的间隙减少来获得下界。作为我们简化的副产品，我们还获得了 Agarwal 和 Procopiuc [SODA '98, Algorithmica '02] 的精确算法，该算法在 $n^{O\left(d\cdot k^{1-1/d}\right)}$ 时间内运行，对于 $d$ 维欧几里德空间中 $n$ 点上的离散 $k$-中心，是渐近最优的。形式上，我们证明，如果对于某些 $d\geq 2$ 和某些可计算函数 $f$，存在一个 $f(k)\cdot n^{o\left(k^{1-1/d}\right)}$ 时间精确算法，用于 $d$ 维欧几里得空间中 $n$ 点上的离散 $k$ 中心问题，则指数时间假设 (ETH) 失败。以前，这样的下限仅在 $d=2$ 时已知，并且隐含在 Marx 的著作中 [IWPEC '06]。 [完整摘要请参见论文]

AI.tldr: 本文针对欧几里得空间中的离散k中心问题，证明了现有近似和精确算法的时间复杂度在指数时间假设（ETH）下是紧致的下界。
AI.motivation: 尽管已有近似和精确算法，但缺乏对这些算法时间复杂度的理论下界证明，需通过计算复杂性理论确认其最优性。
AI.method: 通过设计从d维约束满足问题（CSP）到离散k中心问题的间隙归约，结合指数时间假设（ETH）推导出时间复杂度下界。
AI.result: 证明了若存在更优算法，则ETH不成立；同时确认Agarwal-Procopiuc算法的近似和精确版本在ETH下达到时间复杂度下限。
AI.conclusion: 现有离散k中心算法在ETH框架下已达到理论最优，为相关问题的算法设计提供了复杂性边界参考。

authors_text: William Theisen,Daniel Gonzalez Cedre,Zachariah Carmichael,Daniel Moreira,Tim Weninger,Walter Scheirer
title: Motif Mining: Finding and Summarizing Remixed Image Content
title_zh: 主题挖掘：查找和总结重新混合的图像内容
abstract: On the internet, images are no longer static; they have become dynamic content. Thanks to the availability of smartphones with cameras and easy-to-use editing software, images can be remixed (i.e., redacted, edited, and recombined with other content) on-the-fly and with a world-wide audience that can repeat the process. From digital art to memes, the evolution of images through time is now an important topic of study for digital humanists, social scientists, and media forensics specialists. However, because typical data sets in computer vision are composed of static content, the development of automated algorithms to analyze remixed content has been limited. In this paper, we introduce the idea of Motif Mining - the process of finding and summarizing remixed image content in large collections of unlabeled and unsorted data. In this paper, this idea is formalized and a reference implementation is introduced. Experiments are conducted on three meme-style data sets, including a newly collected set associated with the information war in the Russo-Ukrainian conflict. The proposed motif mining approach is able to identify related remixed content that, when compared to similar approaches, more closely aligns with the preferences and expectations of human observers.
summary: On the internet, images are no longer static; they have become dynamic content. Thanks to the availability of smartphones with cameras and easy-to-use editing software, images can be remixed (i.e., redacted, edited, and recombined with other content) on-the-fly and with a world-wide audience that can repeat the process. From digital art to memes, the evolution of images through time is now an important topic of study for digital humanists, social scientists, and media forensics specialists. However, because typical data sets in computer vision are composed of static content, the development of automated algorithms to analyze remixed content has been limited. In this paper, we introduce the idea of Motif Mining - the process of finding and summarizing remixed image content in large collections of unlabeled and unsorted data. In this paper, this idea is formalized and a reference implementation is introduced. Experiments are conducted on three meme-style data sets, including a newly collected set associated with the information war in the Russo-Ukrainian conflict. The proposed motif mining approach is able to identify related remixed content that, when compared to similar approaches, more closely aligns with the preferences and expectations of human observers.
abstract_zh: 在互联网上，图像不再是静态的；它们已成为动态内容。由于配备摄像头和易于使用的编辑软件的智能手机的出现，图像可以即时重新混合（即编辑、编辑并与其他内容重新组合），并且全世界的观众都可以重复这个过程。从数字艺术到迷因，图像随时间的演变现在是数字人文主义者、社会科学家和媒体取证专家的一个重要研究课题。然而，由于计算机视觉中的典型数据集由静态内容组成，因此分析重新混合内容的自动化算法的开发受到限制。在本文中，我们介绍了主题挖掘的思想——在大量未标记和未排序的数据中查找和总结重新混合的图像内容的过程。在本文中，这个想法被形式化，并介绍了一个参考实现。在三个模因式数据集上进行了实验，其中包括新收集的与俄罗斯-乌克兰冲突中的信息战相关的数据集。所提出的主题挖掘方法能够识别相关的重新混合内容，与类似的方法相比，这些内容更符合人类观察者的偏好和期望。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为Motif Mining的方法，用于在大规模未标记数据集中发现和总结被重新编辑的图像内容。
AI.motivation: 随着互联网图像内容的动态化和再创作化，传统静态图像分析方法难以满足对再编辑内容进行自动化分析的需求，亟需新的算法工具。
AI.method: 通过形式化定义Motif Mining框架，结合参考实现，在三个包含网络迷因的图像数据集（含俄乌冲突信息战新数据集）中进行实验验证。
AI.result: 该方法在识别再编辑内容方面优于现有技术，其结果更符合人类观察者的偏好和预期。
AI.conclusion: Motif Mining为动态图像内容分析提供了有效解决方案，可助力数字人文、社会科学研究及媒体取证领域的发展。

authors_text: Hyeok Kim,Ryan Rossi,Fan Du,Eunyee Koh,Shunan Guo,Jessica Hullman,Jane Hoffswell
title: Cicero: A Declarative Grammar for Responsive Visualization
title_zh: Cicero：响应式可视化的声明性语法
abstract: Designing responsive visualizations can be cast as applying transformations to a source view to render it suitable for a different screen size. However, designing responsive visualizations is often tedious as authors must manually apply and reason about candidate transformations. We present Cicero, a declarative grammar for concisely specifying responsive visualization transformations which paves the way for more intelligent responsive visualization authoring tools. Cicero's flexible specifier syntax allows authors to select visualization elements to transform, independent of the source view's structure. Cicero encodes a concise set of actions to encode a diverse set of transformations in both desktop-first and mobile-first design processes. Authors can ultimately reuse design-agnostic transformations across different visualizations. To demonstrate the utility of Cicero, we develop a compiler to an extended version of Vega-Lite, and provide principles for our compiler. We further discuss the incorporation of Cicero into responsive visualization authoring tools, such as a design recommender.
summary: Designing responsive visualizations can be cast as applying transformations to a source view to render it suitable for a different screen size. However, designing responsive visualizations is often tedious as authors must manually apply and reason about candidate transformations. We present Cicero, a declarative grammar for concisely specifying responsive visualization transformations which paves the way for more intelligent responsive visualization authoring tools. Cicero's flexible specifier syntax allows authors to select visualization elements to transform, independent of the source view's structure. Cicero encodes a concise set of actions to encode a diverse set of transformations in both desktop-first and mobile-first design processes. Authors can ultimately reuse design-agnostic transformations across different visualizations. To demonstrate the utility of Cicero, we develop a compiler to an extended version of Vega-Lite, and provide principles for our compiler. We further discuss the incorporation of Cicero into responsive visualization authoring tools, such as a design recommender.
abstract_zh: 设计响应式可视化可以转化为对源视图应用转换以使其适合不同的屏幕尺寸。然而，设计响应式可视化通常很乏味，因为作者必须手动应用和推理候选转换。我们提出了 Cicero，一种声明性语法，用于简洁地指定响应式可视化转换，为更智能的响应式可视化创作工具铺平了道路。 Cicero 灵活的说明符语法允许作者选择要转换的可视化元素，而与源视图的结构无关。 Cicero 编码了一组简洁的操作，以编码桌面优先和移动优先设计过程中的一组不同的转换。作者最终可以在不同的可视化中重复使用与设计无关的转换。为了演示 Cicero 的实用性，我们开发了一个 Vega-Lite 扩展版本的编译器，并提供了我们的编译器的原理。我们进一步讨论将 Cicero 纳入响应式可视化创作工具，例如设计推荐器。

AI.tldr: 本文提出Cicero，一种用于响应式可视化的声明式语法，旨在简化转换设计并支持智能工具开发。
AI.motivation: 现有响应式可视化设计依赖手动转换，过程繁琐且缺乏智能辅助工具，限制了效率和灵活性。
AI.method: 设计Cicero的灵活语法以定义跨设备的可视化转换，并开发其到Vega-Lite的编译器，同时提出整合到作者工具的原则。
AI.result: 实现了Cicero编译器，验证了其在桌面优先和移动优先设计中的有效性，并探讨了与设计推荐系统的结合。
AI.conclusion: Cicero为响应式可视化提供了统一、可重用的解决方案，推动了更智能的可视化开发工具的发展。

authors_text: Fernanda L. Ribeiro,Steffen Bollmann,Ross Cunnington,Alexander M. Puckett
title: An explainability framework for cortical surface-based deep learning
title_zh: 基于皮质表面的深度学习的可解释性框架
abstract: The emergence of explainability methods has enabled a better comprehension of how deep neural networks operate through concepts that are easily understood and implemented by the end user. While most explainability methods have been designed for traditional deep learning, some have been further developed for geometric deep learning, in which data are predominantly represented as graphs. These representations are regularly derived from medical imaging data, particularly in the field of neuroimaging, in which graphs are used to represent brain structural and functional wiring patterns (brain connectomes) and cortical surface models are used to represent the anatomical structure of the brain. Although explainability techniques have been developed for identifying important vertices (brain areas) and features for graph classification, these methods are still lacking for more complex tasks, such as surface-based modality transfer (or vertex-wise regression). Here, we address the need for surface-based explainability approaches by developing a framework for cortical surface-based deep learning, providing a transparent system for modality transfer tasks. First, we adapted a perturbation-based approach for use with surface data. Then, we applied our perturbation-based method to investigate the key features and vertices used by a geometric deep learning model developed to predict brain function from anatomy directly on a cortical surface model. We show that our explainability framework is not only able to identify important features and their spatial location but that it is also reliable and valid.
summary: The emergence of explainability methods has enabled a better comprehension of how deep neural networks operate through concepts that are easily understood and implemented by the end user. While most explainability methods have been designed for traditional deep learning, some have been further developed for geometric deep learning, in which data are predominantly represented as graphs. These representations are regularly derived from medical imaging data, particularly in the field of neuroimaging, in which graphs are used to represent brain structural and functional wiring patterns (brain connectomes) and cortical surface models are used to represent the anatomical structure of the brain. Although explainability techniques have been developed for identifying important vertices (brain areas) and features for graph classification, these methods are still lacking for more complex tasks, such as surface-based modality transfer (or vertex-wise regression). Here, we address the need for surface-based explainability approaches by developing a framework for cortical surface-based deep learning, providing a transparent system for modality transfer tasks. First, we adapted a perturbation-based approach for use with surface data. Then, we applied our perturbation-based method to investigate the key features and vertices used by a geometric deep learning model developed to predict brain function from anatomy directly on a cortical surface model. We show that our explainability framework is not only able to identify important features and their spatial location but that it is also reliable and valid.
abstract_zh: 可解释性方法的出现使得人们能够更好地理解深度神经网络如何通过最终用户易于理解和实现的概念进行操作。虽然大多数可解释性方法是为传统深度学习设计的，但有些方法已针对几何深度学习进一步开发，其中数据主要表示为图形。这些表示通常源自医学成像数据，特别是在神经成像领域，其中图形用于表示大脑结构和功能接线模式（脑连接组），皮层表面模型用于表示大脑的解剖结构。尽管已经开发了可解释性技术来识别重要的顶点（大脑区域）和图分类的特征，但这些方法仍然缺乏更复杂的任务，例如基于表面的模态转移（或顶点回归）。在这里，我们通过开发基于皮层表面的深度学习框架来满足基于表面的可解释性方法的需求，为模态转移任务提供透明的系统。首先，我们采用了基于扰动的方法来处理表面数​​据。然后，我们应用基于扰动的方法来研究几何深度学习模型所使用的关键特征和顶点，该模型是为了直接在皮质表面模型上根据解剖学预测大脑功能而开发的。我们表明，我们的可解释性框架不仅能够识别重要特征及其空间位置，而且也是可靠和有效的。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于皮层表面的深度学习可解释性框架，用于解决表面模态转换等复杂任务。
AI.motivation: 现有可解释性方法难以处理基于皮层表面的复杂任务（如顶点级回归），而神经影像学中需要解析脑结构与功能关系的模型亟需此类工具。
AI.method: 采用扰动法分析表面数据，结合几何深度学习模型，识别预测脑功能时关键的皮层区域和特征。
AI.result: 框架能有效定位重要特征及其空间位置，且在可靠性与有效性上表现良好。
AI.conclusion: 该框架为基于皮层表面的深度学习提供了透明化解释系统，推动了几何深度学习在神经影像学中的应用。

ai_content_json.method: 采用扰动法分析表面数据，结合几何深度学习模型，识别预测脑功能时关键的皮层区域和特征。
ai_content_json.result: 框架能有效定位重要特征及其空间位置，且在可靠性与有效性上表现良好。
ai_content_json.conclusion: 该框架为基于皮层表面的深度学习提供了透明化解释系统，推动了几何深度学习在神经影像学中的应用。
