search_text: An explainability framework for cortical surface-based deep learning 基于皮质表面的深度学习的可解释性框架 The emergence of explainability methods has enabled a better comprehension of how deep neural networks operate through concepts that are easily understood and implemented by the end user. While most explainability methods have been designed for traditional deep learning, some have been further developed for geometric deep learning, in which data are predominantly represented as graphs. These representations are regularly derived from medical imaging data, particularly in the field of neuroimaging, in which graphs are used to represent brain structural and functional wiring patterns (brain connectomes) and cortical surface models are used to represent the anatomical structure of the brain. Although explainability techniques have been developed for identifying important vertices (brain areas) and features for graph classification, these methods are still lacking for more complex tasks, such as surface-based modality transfer (or vertex-wise regression). Here, we address the need for surface-based explainability approaches by developing a framework for cortical surface-based deep learning, providing a transparent system for modality transfer tasks. First, we adapted a perturbation-based approach for use with surface data. Then, we applied our perturbation-based method to investigate the key features and vertices used by a geometric deep learning model developed to predict brain function from anatomy directly on a cortical surface model. We show that our explainability framework is not only able to identify important features and their spatial location but that it is also reliable and valid. 可解释性方法的出现使得人们能够更好地理解深度神经网络如何通过最终用户易于理解和实现的概念进行操作。虽然大多数可解释性方法是为传统深度学习设计的，但有些方法已针对几何深度学习进一步开发，其中数据主要表示为图形。这些表示通常源自医学成像数据，特别是在神经成像领域，其中图形用于表示大脑结构和功能接线模式（脑连接组），皮层表面模型用于表示大脑的解剖结构。尽管已经开发了可解释性技术来识别重要的顶点（大脑区域）和图分类的特征，但这些方法仍然缺乏更复杂的任务，例如基于表面的模态转移（或顶点回归）。在这里，我们通过开发基于皮层表面的深度学习框架来满足基于表面的可解释性方法的需求，为模态转移任务提供透明的系统。首先，我们采用了基于扰动的方法来处理表面数​​据。然后，我们应用基于扰动的方法来研究几何深度学习模型所使用的关键特征和顶点，该模型是为了直接在皮质表面模型上根据解剖学预测大脑功能而开发的。我们表明，我们的可解释性框架不仅能够识别重要特征及其空间位置，而且也是可靠和有效的。 本文提出了一种基于皮层表面的深度学习可解释性框架，用于解决表面模态转换等复杂任务。 Fernanda L. Ribeiro,Steffen Bollmann,Ross Cunnington,Alexander M. Puckett q-bio.NC,cs.CV,q-bio.QM

authors_text: Yaoyiran Li,Fangyu Liu,Nigel Collier,Anna Korhonen,Ivan Vulić
title: Improving Word Translation via Two-Stage Contrastive Learning
title_zh: 通过两阶段对比学习改进单词翻译
abstract: Word translation or bilingual lexicon induction (BLI) is a key cross-lingual task, aiming to bridge the lexical gap between different languages. In this work, we propose a robust and effective two-stage contrastive learning framework for the BLI task. At Stage C1, we propose to refine standard cross-lingual linear maps between static word embeddings (WEs) via a contrastive learning objective; we also show how to integrate it into the self-learning procedure for even more refined cross-lingual maps. In Stage C2, we conduct BLI-oriented contrastive fine-tuning of mBERT, unlocking its word translation capability. We also show that static WEs induced from the `C2-tuned' mBERT complement static WEs from Stage C1. Comprehensive experiments on standard BLI datasets for diverse languages and different experimental setups demonstrate substantial gains achieved by our framework. While the BLI method from Stage C1 already yields substantial gains over all state-of-the-art BLI methods in our comparison, even stronger improvements are met with the full two-stage framework: e.g., we report gains for 112/112 BLI setups, spanning 28 language pairs.
summary: Word translation or bilingual lexicon induction (BLI) is a key cross-lingual task, aiming to bridge the lexical gap between different languages. In this work, we propose a robust and effective two-stage contrastive learning framework for the BLI task. At Stage C1, we propose to refine standard cross-lingual linear maps between static word embeddings (WEs) via a contrastive learning objective; we also show how to integrate it into the self-learning procedure for even more refined cross-lingual maps. In Stage C2, we conduct BLI-oriented contrastive fine-tuning of mBERT, unlocking its word translation capability. We also show that static WEs induced from the `C2-tuned' mBERT complement static WEs from Stage C1. Comprehensive experiments on standard BLI datasets for diverse languages and different experimental setups demonstrate substantial gains achieved by our framework. While the BLI method from Stage C1 already yields substantial gains over all state-of-the-art BLI methods in our comparison, even stronger improvements are met with the full two-stage framework: e.g., we report gains for 112/112 BLI setups, spanning 28 language pairs.
abstract_zh: 单词翻译或双语词典归纳（BLI）是一项关键的跨语言任务，旨在弥合不同语言之间的词汇差距。在这项工作中，我们为 BLI 任务提出了一个稳健且有效的两阶段对比学习框架。在C1阶段，我们建议通过对比学习目标来细化静态词嵌入（WE）之间的标准跨语言线性映射；我们还展示了如何将其集成到自学习程序中，以获得更精致的跨语言地图。在C2阶段，我们对mBERT进行面向BLI的对比微调，解锁其单词翻译能力。我们还表明，“C2 调整”mBERT 引发的静态 WE 补充了阶段 C1 的静态 WE。针对不同语言和不同实验设置的标准 BLI 数据集的综合实验证明了我们的框架取得了巨大的成果。虽然阶段 C1 的 BLI 方法在我们的比较中已经比所有最先进的 BLI 方法产生了显着的收益，但完整的两阶段框架可以实现更强大的改进：例如，我们报告了 112/112 BLI 设置的收益，涵盖 28 种语言对。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种两阶段对比学习框架，用于改进词翻译和双语词典归纳任务。
AI.motivation: 现有双语词典归纳方法在跨语言词汇映射中存在性能瓶颈，需通过更有效的对比学习策略提升词翻译能力。
AI.method: 分两阶段优化：C1阶段通过对比学习精炼静态词嵌入的跨语言映射，并结合自学习机制；C2阶段对mBERT进行BLI导向的对比微调，融合两阶段的词嵌入表示。
AI.result: 在28种语言对的112个BLI任务中全面超越现有方法，所有实验设置均取得显著提升。
AI.conclusion: 两阶段框架有效提升跨语言词翻译性能，尤其第二阶段微调显著增强模型能力，未来可探索更多阶段扩展或应用。

authors_text: Kawsher Roxy,Stephen Longofono,Sebastien Olliver,Sanjukta Bhanja,Alex K. Jones
title: Pinning Fault Mode Modeling for DWM Shifting
title_zh: DWM 换档的固定故障模式建模
comment: IEEE Transactions on Circuits and Systems--II, 2022
comments: IEEE Transactions on Circuits and Systems--II, 2022
abstract: Extreme scaling for purposes of achieving higher density and lower energy continues to increase the probability of memory faults. For domain wall (DW) memories, misalignment faults arise when aligning domains with access points. A previously understudied type of shifting fault, a pinning fault may occur due to non-uniform pinning potential distribution caused by notches with fabrication imperfections. This non-uniformity can pin a wall during current-induced DW motion. This paper provides a model of geometric variations varying width, depth, and curvature variations of a notch, their impacts on the critical shift current, and a study of the resulting impact on fault rates of DW memory systems. An increase in the effective critical shift current due to 5% variation predicts a pinning fault rate on the order of $10^{-8}$ per shift, which results in a mean-time-to-failure of circa 2s for a DW memory system.
summary: Extreme scaling for purposes of achieving higher density and lower energy continues to increase the probability of memory faults. For domain wall (DW) memories, misalignment faults arise when aligning domains with access points. A previously understudied type of shifting fault, a pinning fault may occur due to non-uniform pinning potential distribution caused by notches with fabrication imperfections. This non-uniformity can pin a wall during current-induced DW motion. This paper provides a model of geometric variations varying width, depth, and curvature variations of a notch, their impacts on the critical shift current, and a study of the resulting impact on fault rates of DW memory systems. An increase in the effective critical shift current due to 5% variation predicts a pinning fault rate on the order of $10^{-8}$ per shift, which results in a mean-time-to-failure of circa 2s for a DW memory system.
abstract_zh: 为了实现更高密度和更低能耗而进行的极端缩放继续增加了内存故障的可能性。对于畴壁 (DW) 存储器，将域与接入点对齐时会出现未对准故障。钉扎故障是一种先前未被充分研究的移位故障类型，由于制造缺陷的凹口导致钉扎电位分布不均匀，可能会发生钉扎故障。在电流引起的 DW 运动期间，这种不均匀性可能会钉住墙壁。本文提供了一个凹口宽度、深度和曲率变化的几何变化模型、它们对临界移位电流的影响，以及对 DW 存储系统故障率的影响的研究。由于 5% 的变化而导致有效临界移位电流的增加，预测钉扎故障率约为每班 10^{-8}$ 美元，这导致 DW 内存系统的平均故障时间约为 2 秒。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种针对畴壁内存（DWM）中因凹槽几何变化导致的钉扎故障的建模方法，分析其对临界位移电流和故障率的影响。
AI.motivation: 随着内存密度提升和能耗降低的需求，畴壁内存的故障概率增加，而由凹槽非均匀钉扎势引起的钉扎故障尚未被充分研究。
AI.method: 通过建立凹槽宽度、深度和曲率变化的几何模型，分析其对临界位移电流的影响，并评估故障率。
AI.result: 5%的几何变化使钉扎故障率达到1e-8次/次位移，导致畴壁内存系统的平均无故障时间约为2秒。
AI.conclusion: 该模型揭示了钉扎故障的机制及其对可靠性的影响，为优化畴壁内存设计提供了理论依据。

This non-uniformity can pin a wall during current-induced DW motion. This paper provides a model of geometric variations varying width, depth, and curvature variations of a notch, their impacts on the critical shift current, and a study of the resulting impact on fault rates of DW memory systems. An increase in the effective critical shift current due to 5% variation predicts a pinning fault rate on the order of $10^{-8}$ per shift, which results in a mean-time-to-failure of circa 2s for a DW memory system. 为了实现更高密度和更低能耗而进行的极端缩放继续增加了内存故障的可能性。对于畴壁 (DW) 存储器，将域与接入点对齐时会出现未对准故障。钉扎故障是一种先前未被充分研究的移位故障类型，由于制造缺陷的凹口导致钉扎电位分布不均匀，可能会发生钉扎故障。在电流引起的 DW 运动期间，这种不均匀性可能会钉住墙壁。本文提供了一个凹口宽度、深度和曲率变化的几何变化模型、它们对临界移位电流的影响，以及对 DW 存储系统故障率的影响的研究。由于 5% 的变化而导致有效临界移位电流的增加，预测钉扎故障率约为每班 10^{-8}$ 美元，这导致 DW 内存系统的平均故障时间约为 2 秒。 本文提出了一种针对畴壁内存（DWM）中因凹槽几何变化导致的钉扎故障的建模方法，分析其对临界位移电流和故障率的影响。 Kawsher Roxy,Stephen Longofono,Sebastien Olliver,Sanjukta Bhanja,Alex K. Jones cs.ET,cs.AR

authors_text: Theodore Longtchi,Rosana Montañez Rodriguez,Laith Al-Shawaf,Adham Atyabi,Shouhuai Xu
title: Internet-based Social Engineering Attacks, Defenses and Psychology: A Survey
title_zh: 基于互联网的社会工程攻击、防御和心理：调查
abstract: Social engineering attacks are a major cyber threat because they often serve as a first step for an attacker to break into an otherwise well-defended network, steal victims' credentials, and cause financial losses. The problem has received due amount of attention with many publications proposing defenses against them. Despite this, the situation has not improved. In this paper, we aim to understand and explain this phenomenon by looking into the root cause of the problem. To this end, we examine the literature on attacks and defenses through a unique lens we propose -- {\em psychological factors (PFs) and techniques (PTs)}. We find that there is a big discrepancy between attacks and defenses: Attacks have deliberately exploited PFs by leveraging PTs, but defenses rarely take either of these into consideration, preferring technical solutions. This explains why existing defenses have achieved limited success. This prompts us to propose a roadmap for a more systematic approach towards designing effective defenses against social engineering attacks.
summary: Social engineering attacks are a major cyber threat because they often serve as a first step for an attacker to break into an otherwise well-defended network, steal victims' credentials, and cause financial losses. The problem has received due amount of attention with many publications proposing defenses against them. Despite this, the situation has not improved. In this paper, we aim to understand and explain this phenomenon by looking into the root cause of the problem. To this end, we examine the literature on attacks and defenses through a unique lens we propose -- {\em psychological factors (PFs) and techniques (PTs)}. We find that there is a big discrepancy between attacks and defenses: Attacks have deliberately exploited PFs by leveraging PTs, but defenses rarely take either of these into consideration, preferring technical solutions. This explains why existing defenses have achieved limited success. This prompts us to propose a roadmap for a more systematic approach towards designing effective defenses against social engineering attacks.
abstract_zh: 社会工程攻击是一种主要的网络威胁，因为它们通常是攻击者闯入防御良好的网络、窃取受害者凭证并造成经济损失的第一步。这个问题已经受到了足够的关注，许多出版物都提出了针对该问题的防御措施。尽管如此，情况并没有改善。在本文中，我们旨在通过探究问题的根本原因来理解和解释这一现象。为此，我们通过我们提出的独特视角来研究有关攻击和防御的文献——{\em心理因素（PF）和技术（PT）}。我们发现攻击和防御之间存在很大差异：攻击通过利用PT来故意利用PF，但防御很少考虑其中任何一个，而更倾向于技术解决方案。这解释了为什么现有的防御措施取得了有限的成功。这促使我们提出一个路线图，以更系统的方法来设计针对社会工程攻击的有效防御措施。

AI.tldr: 本文通过分析网络钓鱼攻击与防御的心理因素，探讨社会工程攻击为何难以防范并提出系统性防御方案。
AI.motivation: 尽管已有大量防御措施，社会工程攻击仍持续威胁网络安全，需从心理层面寻找问题根源。
AI.method: 通过文献综述，从心理因素（PFs）和心理技术（PTs）角度分析攻击与防御的差异。
AI.result: 发现攻击者刻意利用心理因素，而防御措施多依赖技术手段，忽视心理层面的对抗。
AI.conclusion: 需构建融合心理学的系统化防御体系，以更有效应对社会工程攻击。

authors_text: Yassir Fathullah,Mark J. F. Gales
title: Self-Distribution Distillation: Efficient Uncertainty Estimation
title_zh: 自分布蒸馏：高效的不确定性估计
comment: 17 pages, 3 figures, 17 tables, submitted to UAI 2022
comments: 17 pages, 3 figures, 17 tables, submitted to UAI 2022
abstract: Deep learning is increasingly being applied in safety-critical domains. For these scenarios it is important to know the level of uncertainty in a model's prediction to ensure appropriate decisions are made by the system. Deep ensembles are the de-facto standard approach to obtaining various measures of uncertainty. However, ensembles often significantly increase the resources required in the training and/or deployment phases. Approaches have been developed that typically address the costs in one of these phases. In this work we propose a novel training approach, self-distribution distillation (S2D), which is able to efficiently train a single model that can estimate uncertainties. Furthermore it is possible to build ensembles of these models and apply hierarchical ensemble distillation approaches. Experiments on CIFAR-100 showed that S2D models outperformed standard models and Monte-Carlo dropout. Additional out-of-distribution detection experiments on LSUN, Tiny ImageNet, SVHN showed that even a standard deep ensemble can be outperformed using S2D based ensembles and novel distilled models.
summary: Deep learning is increasingly being applied in safety-critical domains. For these scenarios it is important to know the level of uncertainty in a model's prediction to ensure appropriate decisions are made by the system. Deep ensembles are the de-facto standard approach to obtaining various measures of uncertainty. However, ensembles often significantly increase the resources required in the training and/or deployment phases. Approaches have been developed that typically address the costs in one of these phases. In this work we propose a novel training approach, self-distribution distillation (S2D), which is able to efficiently train a single model that can estimate uncertainties. Furthermore it is possible to build ensembles of these models and apply hierarchical ensemble distillation approaches. Experiments on CIFAR-100 showed that S2D models outperformed standard models and Monte-Carlo dropout. Additional out-of-distribution detection experiments on LSUN, Tiny ImageNet, SVHN showed that even a standard deep ensemble can be outperformed using S2D based ensembles and novel distilled models.
abstract_zh: 深度学习越来越多地应用于安全关键领域。对于这些场景，了解模型预测的不确定性水平非常重要，以确保系统做出适当的决策。深度集成是获得各种不确定性度量的事实上的标准方法。然而，集成通常会显着增加训练和/或部署阶段所需的资源。已经开发出通常解决这些阶段之一的成本的方法。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种新颖的训练方法，即自分布蒸馏（S2D），它能够有效地训练可以估计不确定性的单个模型。此外，可以构建这些模型的集成并应用分层集成蒸馏方法。 CIFAR-100 上的实验表明，S2D 模型的性能优于标准模型和蒙特卡罗 dropout。在 LSUN、Tiny ImageNet、SVHN 上进行的其他分布外检测实验表明，使用基于 S2D 的集成和新颖的精炼模型，即使是标准深度集成也可以表现出色。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为自分布蒸馏（S2D）的新训练方法，用于高效训练单个模型以估计不确定性，并通过实验验证其优于传统方法。
AI.motivation: 深度集成是获取不确定性度量的标准方法，但其在训练和部署阶段资源消耗大，现有方法通常只能解决其中一个阶段的成本问题。
AI.method: 提出自分布蒸馏（S2D）方法，通过训练单个模型实现不确定性估计，并可构建模型集成及分层蒸馏策略。
AI.result: 在CIFAR-100上，S2D模型优于标准模型和蒙特卡洛dropout；在LSUN等数据集的分布外检测实验中，基于S2D的集成模型超越传统深度集成。
AI.conclusion: S2D方法在降低资源消耗的同时有效提升不确定性估计性能，为安全关键领域的模型应用提供高效解决方案。

authors_text: Yuning Qiu,Teruhisa Misu,Carlos Busso
title: Driving Anomaly Detection Using Conditional Generative Adversarial Network
title_zh: 使用条件生成对抗网络驱动异常检测
abstract: Anomaly driving detection is an important problem in advanced driver assistance systems (ADAS). It is important to identify potential hazard scenarios as early as possible to avoid potential accidents. This study proposes an unsupervised method to quantify driving anomalies using a conditional generative adversarial network (GAN). The approach predicts upcoming driving scenarios by conditioning the models on the previously observed signals. The system uses the difference of the output from the discriminator between the predicted and actual signals as a metric to quantify the anomaly degree of a driving segment. We take a driver-centric approach, considering physiological signals from the driver and controller area network-Bus (CAN-Bus) signals from the vehicle. The approach is implemented with convolutional neural networks (CNNs) to extract discriminative feature representations, and with long short-term memory (LSTM) cells to capture temporal information. The study is implemented and evaluated with the driving anomaly dataset (DAD), which includes 250 hours of naturalistic recordings manually annotated with driving events. The experimental results reveal that recordings annotated with events that are likely to be anomalous, such as avoiding on-road pedestrians and traffic rule violations, have higher anomaly scores than recordings without any event annotation. The results are validated with perceptual evaluations, where annotators are asked to assess the risk and familiarity of the videos detected with high anomaly scores. The results indicate that the driving segments with higher anomaly scores are more risky and less regularly seen on the road than other driving segments, validating the proposed unsupervised approach.

The results are validated with perceptual evaluations, where annotators are asked to assess the risk and familiarity of the videos detected with high anomaly scores. The results indicate that the driving segments with higher anomaly scores are more risky and less regularly seen on the road than other driving segments, validating the proposed unsupervised approach.
abstract_zh: 异常驾驶检测是高级驾驶辅助系统（ADAS）中的一个重要问题。尽早识别潜在危险场景以避免潜在事故非常重要。本研究提出了一种使用条件生成对抗网络（GAN）来量化驾驶异常的无监督方法。该方法通过根据之前观察到的信号调节模型来预测即将到来的驾驶场景。该系统使用鉴别器输出的预测信号与实际信号之间的差异作为度量来量化驾驶路段的异常程度。我们采用以驾驶员为中心的方法，考虑来自驾驶员的生理信号和来自车辆的控制器局域网总线 (CAN-Bus) 信号。该方法通过卷积神经网络 (CNN) 来提取判别性特征表示，并通过长短期记忆 (LSTM) 单元来捕获时间信息。该研究使用驾驶异常数据集 (DAD) 进行实施和评估，其中包括 250 小时的自然记录，并手动注释了驾驶事件。实验结果表明，带有可能异常事件注释的记录，例如避开路上行人和违反交通规则的记录，比没有任何事件注释的记录具有更高的异常分数。结果通过感知评估进行验证，其中要求注释者评估检测到的高异常分数视频的风险和熟悉度。结果表明，与其他驾驶路段相比，异常得分较高的驾驶路段风险更大，并且在道路上出现的频率较低，这验证了所提出的无监督方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于条件生成对抗网络（GAN）的无监督方法，用于量化驾驶异常，通过结合驾驶员生理信号和车辆CAN-Bus信号检测潜在危险场景。
AI.motivation: 高级驾驶辅助系统（ADAS）需要尽早识别潜在危险场景以避免事故，但现有方法在无监督场景下难以有效量化驾驶异常。
AI.method: 利用条件GAN预测驾驶场景，通过判别器输出的预测信号与实际信号差异作为异常度量指标，结合CNN提取特征和LSTM捕捉时序信息，并使用包含250小时真实驾驶数据的DAD数据集进行验证。
AI.result: 实验表明，标注为异常事件（如避让行人、违规）的驾驶片段具有更高异常分数，且经标注员评估验证，高异常分数片段风险更高且道路出现频率更低。
AI.conclusion: 该无监督方法通过整合驾驶员生理信号与车辆数据，有效检测驾驶异常，验证了基于GAN的异常度量指标在实际场景中的有效性。

search_text: Driving Anomaly Detection Using Conditional Generative Adversarial Network 使用条件生成对抗网络驱动异常检测 Anomaly driving detection is an important problem in advanced driver assistance systems (ADAS). It is important to identify potential hazard scenarios as early as possible to avoid potential accidents. This study proposes an unsupervised method to quantify driving anomalies using a conditional generative adversarial network (GAN). The approach predicts upcoming driving scenarios by conditioning the models on the previously observed signals. The system uses the difference of the output from the discriminator between the predicted and actual signals as a metric to quantify the anomaly degree of a driving segment. We take a driver-centric approach, considering physiological signals from the driver and controller area network-Bus (CAN-Bus) signals from the vehicle. The approach is implemented with convolutional neural networks (CNNs) to extract discriminative feature representations, and with long short-term memory (LSTM) cells to capture temporal information. The study is implemented and evaluated with the driving anomaly dataset (DAD), which includes 250 hours of naturalistic recordings manually annotated with driving events. The experimental results reveal that recordings annotated with events that are likely to be anomalous, such as avoiding on-road pedestrians and traffic rule violations, have higher anomaly scores than recordings without any event annotation. The results are validated with perceptual evaluations, where annotators are asked to assess the risk and familiarity of the videos detected with high anomaly scores. The results indicate that the driving segments with higher anomaly scores are more risky and less regularly seen on the road than other driving segments, validating the proposed unsupervised approach. 异常驾驶检测是高级驾驶辅助系统（ADAS）中的一个重要问题。尽早识别潜在危险场景以避免潜在事故非常重要。本研究提出了一种使用条件生成对抗网络（GAN）来量化驾驶异常的无监督方法。该方法通过根据之前观察到的信号调节模型来预测即将到来的驾驶场景。该系统使用鉴别器输出的预测信号与实际信号之间的差异作为度量来量化驾驶路段的异常程度。我们采用以驾驶员为中心的方法，考虑来自驾驶员的生理信号和来自车辆的控制器局域网总线 (CAN-Bus) 信号。该方法通过卷积神经网络 (CNN) 来提取判别性特征表示，并通过长短期记忆 (LSTM) 单元来捕获时间信息。该研究使用驾驶异常数据集 (DAD) 进行实施和评估，其中包括 250 小时的自然记录，并手动注释了驾驶事件。实验结果表明，带有可能异常事件注释的记录，例如避开路上行人和违反交通规则的记录，比没有任何事件注释的记录具有更高的异常分数。结果通过感知评估进行验证，其中要求注释者评估检测到的高异常分数视频的风险和熟悉度。结果表明，与其他驾驶路段相比，异常得分较高的驾驶路段风险更大，并且在道路上出现的频率较低，这验证了所提出的无监督方法。 本文提出一种基于条件生成对抗网络（GAN）的无监督方法，用于量化驾驶异常，通过结合驾驶员生理信号和车辆CAN-Bus信号检测潜在危险场景。 Yuning Qiu,Teruhisa Misu,Carlos Busso cs.CV

authors_text: Satoshi Kataoka,Seyed Kamyar Seyed Ghasemipour,Daniel Freeman,Igor Mordatch
title: Bi-Manual Manipulation and Attachment via Sim-to-Real Reinforcement Learning
title_zh: 通过模拟到真实的强化学习进行双手操作和附着
comment: Our accompanying project webpage can be found at: https://sites.google.com/view/bimanual-attachment
comments: Our accompanying project webpage can be found at: https://sites.google.com/view/bimanual-attachment
abstract: Most successes in robotic manipulation have been restricted to single-arm robots, which limits the range of solvable tasks to pick-and-place, insertion, and objects rearrangement. In contrast, dual and multi arm robot platforms unlock a rich diversity of problems that can be tackled, such as laundry folding and executing cooking skills. However, developing controllers for multi-arm robots is complexified by a number of unique challenges, such as the need for coordinated bimanual behaviors, and collision avoidance amongst robots. Given these challenges, in this work we study how to solve bi-manual tasks using reinforcement learning (RL) trained in simulation, such that the resulting policies can be executed on real robotic platforms. Our RL approach results in significant simplifications due to using real-time (4Hz) joint-space control and directly passing unfiltered observations to neural networks policies. We also extensively discuss modifications to our simulated environment which lead to effective training of RL policies. In addition to designing control algorithms, a key challenge is how to design fair evaluation tasks for bi-manual robots that stress bimanual coordination, while removing orthogonal complicating factors such as high-level perception. In this work, we design a Connect Task, where the aim is for two robot arms to pick up and attach two blocks with magnetic connection points. We validate our approach with two xArm6 robots and 3D printed blocks with magnetic attachments, and find that our system has 100% success rate at picking up blocks, and 65% success rate at the Connect Task.
summary: Most successes in robotic manipulation have been restricted to single-arm robots, which limits the range of solvable tasks to pick-and-place, insertion, and objects rearrangement. In contrast, dual and multi arm robot platforms unlock a rich diversity of problems that can be tackled, such as laundry folding and executing cooking skills. However, developing controllers for multi-arm robots is complexified by a number of unique challenges, such as the need for coordinated bimanual behaviors, and collision avoidance amongst robots. Given these challenges, in this work we study how to solve bi-manual tasks using reinforcement learning (RL) trained in simulation, such that the resulting policies can be executed on real robotic platforms. Our RL approach results in significant simplifications due to using real-time (4Hz) joint-space control and directly passing unfiltered observations to neural networks policies. We also extensively discuss modifications to our simulated environment which lead to effective training of RL policies. In addition to designing control algorithms, a key challenge is how to design fair evaluation tasks for bi-manual robots that stress bimanual coordination, while removing orthogonal complicating factors such as high-level perception. In this work, we design a Connect Task, where the aim is for two robot arms to pick up and attach two blocks with magnetic connection points. We validate our approach with two xArm6 robots and 3D printed blocks with magnetic attachments, and find that our system has 100% success rate at picking up blocks, and 65% success rate at the Connect Task.
abstract_zh: 机器人操作方面的大多数成功仅限于单臂机器人，这将可解决的任务范围限制为拾取和放置、插入和对象重新排列。相比之下，双臂和多臂机器人平台可以解决丰富多样的问题，例如折叠衣物和执行烹饪技能。然而，开发多臂机器人的控制器因许多独特的挑战而变得复杂，例如需要协调的双手行为以及机器人之间的避免碰撞。考虑到这些挑战，在这项工作中，我们研究如何使用模拟训练的强化学习 (RL) 来解决双手任务，以便可以在真实的机器人平台上执行生成的策略。由于使用实时 (4Hz) 联合空间控制并直接将未经过滤的观察结果传递给神经网络策略，我们的 RL 方法可实现显着的简化。我们还广泛讨论了对模拟环境的修改，从而实现强化学习策略的有效训练。除了设计控制算法外，一个关键的挑战是如何为强调双手协调的双手机器人设计公平的评估任务，同时消除高层感知等正交复杂因素。在这项工作中，我们设计了一个连接任务，其目的是让两个机器人手臂拾取并连接两个带有磁性连接点的块。我们使用两个 xArm6 机器人和带有磁性附件的 3D 打印块验证了我们的方法，发现我们的系统拾取块的成功率为 100%，连接任务的成功率为 65%。

AI.tldr: 本文研究如何通过模拟到现实的强化学习解决双臂机器人的抓取与连接任务。
AI.motivation: 单臂机器人限制了任务复杂度，而双臂机器人可处理如折叠衣物等复杂任务，但面临协调与避障等挑战。
AI.method: 采用强化学习在模拟环境中训练策略，使用实时关节空间控制及未过滤观测数据，并设计磁性连接任务评估双臂协调性。
AI.result: 在xArm6机器人上实现100%抓取成功率，磁性连接任务成功率为65%。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过简化控制实现模拟到现实的有效迁移，验证了双臂协调任务设计的有效性。

authors_text: Stavros Diolatzis,Julien Philip,George Drettakis
title: Active Exploration for Neural Global Illumination of Variable Scenes
title_zh: 可变场景神经全局照明的主动探索
abstract: Neural rendering algorithms introduce a fundamentally new approach for photorealistic rendering, typically by learning a neural representation of illumination on large numbers of ground truth images. When training for a given variable scene, i.e., changing objects, materials, lights and viewpoint, the space D of possible training data instances quickly becomes unmanageable as the dimensions of variable parameters increase. We introduce a novel Active Exploration method using Markov Chain Monte Carlo, which explores D, generating samples (i.e., ground truth renderings) that best help training and interleaves training and on-the-fly sample data generation. We introduce a self-tuning sample reuse strategy to minimize the expensive step of rendering training samples. We apply our approach on a neural generator that learns to render novel scene instances given an explicit parameterization of the scene configuration. Our results show that Active Exploration trains our network much more efficiently than uniformly sampling, and together with our resolution enhancement approach, achieves better quality than uniform sampling at convergence. Our method allows interactive rendering of hard light transport paths (e.g., complex caustics) -- that require very high samples counts to be captured -- and provides dynamic scene navigation and manipulation, after training for 5-18 hours depending on required quality and variations.
summary: Neural rendering algorithms introduce a fundamentally new approach for photorealistic rendering, typically by learning a neural representation of illumination on large numbers of ground truth images. When training for a given variable scene, i.e., changing objects, materials, lights and viewpoint, the space D of possible training data instances quickly becomes unmanageable as the dimensions of variable parameters increase. We introduce a novel Active Exploration method using Markov Chain Monte Carlo, which explores D, generating samples (i.e., ground truth renderings) that best help training and interleaves training and on-the-fly sample data generation. We introduce a self-tuning sample reuse strategy to minimize the expensive step of rendering training samples. We apply our approach on a neural generator that learns to render novel scene instances given an explicit parameterization of the scene configuration. Our results show that Active Exploration trains our network much more efficiently than uniformly sampling, and together with our resolution enhancement approach, achieves better quality than uniform sampling at convergence. Our method allows interactive rendering of hard light transport paths (e.g., complex caustics) -- that require very high samples counts to be captured -- and provides dynamic scene navigation and manipulation, after training for 5-18 hours depending on required quality and variations.
abstract_zh: 神经渲染算法引入了一种全新的真实感渲染方法，通常是通过学习大量地面实况图像上照明的神经表示。当针对给定的可变场景（即改变对象、材质、灯光和视点）进行训练时，随着可变参数维度的增加，可能的训练数据实例的空间 D 很快变得难以管理。我们引入了一种使用马尔可夫链蒙特卡罗的新颖主动探索方法，该方法探索 D，生成最有助于训练的样本（即地面实况渲染），并交织训练和动态样本数据生成。我们引入了一种自调整样本重用策略，以最大限度地减少渲染训练样本的昂贵步骤。我们将我们的方法应用于神经生成器，该生成器在给定场景配置的显式参数化的情况下学习渲染新的场景实例。我们的结果表明，主动探索比均匀采样更有效地训练我们的网络，并且与我们的分辨率增强方法一起，在收敛时实现了比均匀采样更好的质量。我们的方法允许对硬光传输路径（例如复杂的焦散）进行交互式渲染——这需要捕获非常高的样本数——并在根据所需的质量和变化进行 5-18 小时的训练后提供动态场景导航和操作。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于马尔可夫链蒙特卡洛的主动探索方法，用于提高神经全局光照在可变场景中的训练效率。
AI.motivation: 传统神经渲染方法在处理可变场景（物体、材质、光源和视角变化）时，因训练数据空间维度爆炸导致效率低下，且难以捕捉复杂光照路径。
AI.method: 采用马尔可夫链蒙特卡洛主动探索策略，动态生成对训练最有价值的样本，并结合自适应样本复用技术减少渲染开销，同时使用显式场景参数化神经生成器进行训练。
AI.result: 相比均匀采样，该方法显著提升训练效率，结合分辨率增强技术后收敛质量更优，并可实现复杂焦散光效的交互式渲染及动态场景操控。
AI.conclusion: 主动探索方法有效解决了可变场景神经渲染的高维数据难题，在保证质量的前提下实现了高效训练与实时交互渲染。

search_text: Active Exploration for Neural Global Illumination of Variable Scenes 可变场景神经全局照明的主动探索 Neural rendering algorithms introduce a fundamentally new approach for photorealistic rendering, typically by learning a neural representation of illumination on large numbers of ground truth images. When training for a given variable scene, i.e., changing objects, materials, lights and viewpoint, the space D of possible training data instances quickly becomes unmanageable as the dimensions of variable parameters increase. We introduce a novel Active Exploration method using Markov Chain Monte Carlo, which explores D, generating samples (i.e., ground truth renderings) that best help training and interleaves training and on-the-fly sample data generation. We introduce a self-tuning sample reuse strategy to minimize the expensive step of rendering training samples. We apply our approach on a neural generator that learns to render novel scene instances given an explicit parameterization of the scene configuration. Our results show that Active Exploration trains our network much more efficiently than uniformly sampling, and together with our resolution enhancement approach, achieves better quality than uniform sampling at convergence. Our method allows interactive rendering of hard light transport paths (e.g., complex caustics) -- that require very high samples counts to be captured -- and provides dynamic scene navigation and manipulation, after training for 5-18 hours depending on required quality and variations. 神经渲染算法引入了一种全新的真实感渲染方法，通常是通过学习大量地面实况图像上照明的神经表示。当针对给定的可变场景（即改变对象、材质、灯光和视点）进行训练时，随着可变参数维度的增加，可能的训练数据实例的空间 D 很快变得难以管理。我们引入了一种使用马尔可夫链蒙特卡罗的新颖主动探索方法，该方法探索 D，生成最有助于训练的样本（即地面实况渲染），并交织训练和动态样本数据生成。我们引入了一种自调整样本重用策略，以最大限度地减少渲染训练样本的昂贵步骤。我们将我们的方法应用于神经生成器，该生成器在给定场景配置的显式参数化的情况下学习渲染新的场景实例。我们的结果表明，主动探索比均匀采样更有效地训练我们的网络，并且与我们的分辨率增强方法一起，在收敛时实现了比均匀采样更好的质量。我们的方法允许对硬光传输路径（例如复杂的焦散）进行交互式渲染——这需要捕获非常高的样本数——并在根据所需的质量和变化进行 5-18 小时的训练后提供动态场景导航和操作。 本文提出一种基于马尔可夫链蒙特卡洛的主动探索方法，用于提高神经全局光照在可变场景中的训练效率。 Stavros Diolatzis,Julien Philip,George Drettakis cs.GR,cs.CV

authors_text: Michael James Horry,Subrata Chakraborty,Biswajeet Pradhan,Nagesh Shukla,Sanjoy Paul
title: 2-speed network ensemble for efficient classification of incremental land-use/land-cover satellite image chips
title_zh: 用于增量土地利用/土地覆盖卫星图像芯片高效分类的 2 速网络集成
abstract: The ever-growing volume of satellite imagery data presents a challenge for industry and governments making data-driven decisions based on the timely analysis of very large data sets. Commonly used deep learning algorithms for automatic classification of satellite images are time and resource-intensive to train. The cost of retraining in the context of Big Data presents a practical challenge when new image data and/or classes are added to a training corpus. Recognizing the need for an adaptable, accurate, and scalable satellite image chip classification scheme, in this research we present an ensemble of: i) a slow to train but high accuracy vision transformer; and ii) a fast to train, low-parameter convolutional neural network. The vision transformer model provides a scalable and accurate foundation model. The high-speed CNN provides an efficient means of incorporating newly labelled data into analysis, at the expense of lower accuracy. To simulate incremental data, the very large (~400,000 images) So2Sat LCZ42 satellite image chip dataset is divided into four intervals, with the high-speed CNN retrained every interval and the vision transformer trained every half interval. This experimental setup mimics an increase in data volume and diversity over time. For the task of automated land-cover/land-use classification, the ensemble models for each data increment outperform each of the component models, with best accuracy of 65% against a holdout test partition of the So2Sat dataset. The proposed ensemble and staggered training schedule provide a scalable and cost-effective satellite image classification scheme that is optimized to process very large volumes of satellite data.
summary: The ever-growing volume of satellite imagery data presents a challenge for industry and governments making data-driven decisions based on the timely analysis of very large data sets. Commonly used deep learning algorithms for automatic classification of satellite images are time and resource-intensive to train. The cost of retraining in the context of Big Data presents a practical challenge when new image data and/or classes are added to a training corpus. Recognizing the need for an adaptable, accurate, and scalable satellite image chip classification scheme, in this research we present an ensemble of: i) a slow to train but high accuracy vision transformer; and ii) a fast to train, low-parameter convolutional neural network. The vision transformer model provides a scalable and accurate foundation model. The high-speed CNN provides an efficient means of incorporating newly labelled data into analysis, at the expense of lower accuracy. To simulate incremental data, the very large (~400,000 images) So2Sat LCZ42 satellite image chip dataset is divided into four intervals, with the high-speed CNN retrained every interval and the vision transformer trained every half interval. This experimental setup mimics an increase in data volume and diversity over time. For the task of automated land-cover/land-use classification, the ensemble models for each data increment outperform each of the component models, with best accuracy of 65% against a holdout test partition of the So2Sat dataset. The proposed ensemble and staggered training schedule provide a scalable and cost-effective satellite image classification scheme that is optimized to process very large volumes of satellite data.
abstract_zh: 卫星图像数据量的不断增长给行业和政府带来了挑战，他们需要根据对超大型数据集的及时分析来制定数据驱动的决策。用于卫星图像自动分类的常用深度学习算法的训练需要大量时间和资源。当新的图像数据和/或类添加到训练语料库时，大数据背景下的再训练成本提出了实际挑战。认识到对适应性强、准确且可扩展的卫星图像芯片分类方案的需求，在这项研究中，我们提出了一个集成：i）训练缓慢但精度高的视觉变换器； ii) 快速训练的低参数卷积神经网络。视觉转换器模型提供了可扩展且准确的基础模型。高速 CNN 提供了一种将新标记的数据纳入分析的有效方法，但代价是准确性较低。为了模拟增量数据，非常大（约 400,000 张图像）的 So2Sat LCZ42 卫星图像芯片数据集被分为四个间隔，每个间隔重新训练高速 CNN，每半个间隔训练视觉变压器。该实验设置模拟了数据量和多样性随着时间的推移而增加的情况。对于自动土地覆盖/土地利用分类任务，每个数据增量的集成模型都优于每个组件模型，相对于 So2Sat 数据集的保留测试分区，最佳准确度为 65%。所提出的集合和交错训练计划提供了一种可扩展且具有成本效益的卫星图像分类方案，该方案经过优化以处理大量卫星数据。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种双速网络集成方法，结合高精度但训练缓慢的视觉Transformer和高效但精度较低的CNN，用于增量处理卫星图像芯片的分类任务。
AI.motivation: 随着卫星图像数据量激增，传统深度学习方法面临训练耗时、新增数据或类别时需重新训练的高成本问题，亟需一种可扩展、适应性强的分类方案。
AI.method: 构建由视觉Transformer（慢速高精度）和CNN（快速低参数）组成的集成模型，采用分阶段训练策略：CNN每周期重训练，Transformer每半周期训练，模拟数据增量场景。
AI.result: 在So2Sat LCZ42数据集上，集成模型在测试集上达到65%的分类准确率，优于单独使用任一模型的性能。
AI.conclusion: 该集成方法通过结合两种模型的优势，为处理大规模卫星图像数据提供了可扩展且成本效益高的分类框架。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出一种双速网络集成方法，结合高精度但训练缓慢的视觉Transformer和高效但精度较低的CNN，用于增量处理卫星图像芯片的分类任务。

ai_content.conclusion: 该集成方法通过结合两种模型的优势，为处理大规模卫星图像数据提供了可扩展且成本效益高的分类框架。

authors_text: Muhammed Yusuf Kocyigit,Jiho Lee,Derry Wijaya
title: Better Quality Estimation for Low Resource Corpus Mining
title_zh: 低资源语料库挖掘的更好质量估计
comment: To be published in: Findigs of ACL2022. 9 Pages + Appendix
comments: To be published in: Findigs of ACL2022. 9 Pages + Appendix
abstract: Quality Estimation (QE) models have the potential to change how we evaluate and maybe even train machine translation models. However, these models still lack the robustness to achieve general adoption. We show that State-of-the-art QE models, when tested in a Parallel Corpus Mining (PCM) setting, perform unexpectedly bad due to a lack of robustness to out-of-domain examples. We propose a combination of multitask training, data augmentation and contrastive learning to achieve better and more robust QE performance. We show that our method improves QE performance significantly in the MLQE challenge and the robustness of QE models when tested in the Parallel Corpus Mining setup. We increase the accuracy in PCM by more than 0.80, making it on par with state-of-the-art PCM methods that use millions of sentence pairs to train their models. In comparison, we use a thousand times less data, 7K parallel sentences in total, and propose a novel low resource PCM method.
summary: Quality Estimation (QE) models have the potential to change how we evaluate and maybe even train machine translation models. However, these models still lack the robustness to achieve general adoption. We show that State-of-the-art QE models, when tested in a Parallel Corpus Mining (PCM) setting, perform unexpectedly bad due to a lack of robustness to out-of-domain examples. We propose a combination of multitask training, data augmentation and contrastive learning to achieve better and more robust QE performance. We show that our method improves QE performance significantly in the MLQE challenge and the robustness of QE models when tested in the Parallel Corpus Mining setup. We increase the accuracy in PCM by more than 0.80, making it on par with state-of-the-art PCM methods that use millions of sentence pairs to train their models. In comparison, we use a thousand times less data, 7K parallel sentences in total, and propose a novel low resource PCM method.
abstract_zh: 质量估计（QE）模型有可能改变我们评估甚至训练机器翻译模型的方式。然而，这些模型仍然缺乏实现普遍采用的稳健性。我们表明，最先进的 QE 模型在并行语料库挖掘 (PCM) 设置中进行测试时，由于缺乏对域外示例的鲁棒性，其表现出乎意料地糟糕。我们提出将多任务训练、数据增强和对比学习相结合，以实现更好、更稳健的 QE 性能。我们表明，我们的方法在 MLQE 挑战中显着提高了 QE 性能，并且在并行语料库挖掘设置中进行测试时提高了 QE 模型的稳健性。我们将 PCM 的准确率提高了 0.80 以上，使其与使用数百万个句子对来训练模型的最先进的 PCM 方法相当。相比之下，我们使用了一千倍的数据，总共 7K 个并行句子，并提出了一种新颖的低资源 PCM 方法。

AI.motivation: 现有质量估计模型在领域外数据中表现不佳，且传统平行语料挖掘需大量数据，缺乏高效解决方案。
AI.method: 结合多任务训练、数据增强和对比学习，提升模型鲁棒性并减少数据需求。
AI.result: 准确率提升0.80，使用7K平行句，效果媲美使用百万句对的现有方法。
AI.conclusion: 提出有效低资源PCM方法，为领域外数据应用提供新思路。

search_text: Better Quality Estimation for Low Resource Corpus Mining 低资源语料库挖掘的更好质量估计 Quality Estimation (QE) models have the potential to change how we evaluate and maybe even train machine translation models. However, these models still lack the robustness to achieve general adoption. We increase the accuracy in PCM by more than 0.80, making it on par with state-of-the-art PCM methods that use millions of sentence pairs to train their models. authors_text: Morris Antonello,Mihai Dobre,Stefano V. Albrecht,John Redford,Subramanian Ramamoorthy
title: Flash: Fast and Light Motion Prediction for Autonomous Driving with Bayesian Inverse Planning and Learned Motion Profiles
title_zh: Flash：利用贝叶斯逆向规划和学习运动曲线进行自动驾驶的快速、轻型运动预测
comment: IEEE/RSJ International Conference on Intelligent Robots and Systems (IROS) 2022. 8 pages
comments: IEEE/RSJ International Conference on Intelligent Robots and Systems (IROS) 2022. 8 pages
abstract: Motion prediction of road users in traffic scenes is critical for autonomous driving systems that must take safe and robust decisions in complex dynamic environments. We present a novel motion prediction system for autonomous driving. Our system is based on the Bayesian inverse planning framework, which efficiently orchestrates map-based goal extraction, a classical control-based trajectory generator and a mixture of experts collection of light-weight neural networks specialised in motion profile prediction. In contrast to many alternative methods, this modularity helps isolate performance factors and better interpret results, without compromising performance. This system addresses multiple aspects of interest, namely multi-modality, motion profile uncertainty and trajectory physical feasibility. We report on several experiments with the popular highway dataset NGSIM, demonstrating state-of-the-art performance in terms of trajectory error. We also perform a detailed analysis of our system's components, along with experiments that stratify the data based on behaviours, such as change-lane versus follow-lane, to provide insights into the challenges in this domain. Finally, we present a qualitative analysis to show other benefits of our approach, such as the ability to interpret the outputs.
summary: Motion prediction of road users in traffic scenes is critical for autonomous driving systems that must take safe and robust decisions in complex dynamic environments. We present a novel motion prediction system for autonomous driving. Our system is based on the Bayesian inverse planning framework, which efficiently orchestrates map-based goal extraction, a classical control-based trajectory generator and a mixture of experts collection of light-weight neural networks specialised in motion profile prediction. In contrast to many alternative methods, this modularity helps isolate performance factors and better interpret results, without compromising performance. This system addresses multiple aspects of interest, namely multi-modality, motion profile uncertainty and trajectory physical feasibility. We report on several experiments with the popular highway dataset NGSIM, demonstrating state-of-the-art performance in terms of trajectory error. We also perform a detailed analysis of our system's components, along with experiments that stratify the data based on behaviours, such as change-lane versus follow-lane, to provide insights into the challenges in this domain. Finally, we present a qualitative analysis to show other benefits of our approach, such as the ability to interpret the outputs.
abstract_zh: 交通场景中道路使用者的运动预测对于自动驾驶系统至关重要，自动驾驶系统必须在复杂的动态环境中做出安全、稳健的决策。我们提出了一种用于自动驾驶的新型运动预测系统。我们的系统基于贝叶斯逆向规划框架，该框架有效地协调基于地图的目标提取、基于经典控制的轨迹生成器以及专门从事运动轮廓预测的轻量级神经网络专家集合的混合。与许多替代方法相比，这种模块化有助于隔离性能因素并更好地解释结果，而不会影响性能。该系统解决了多个方面的问题，即多模态、运动轮廓不确定性和轨迹物理可行性。我们报告了使用流行的高速公路数据集 NGSIM 进行的多项实验，展示了在轨迹误差方面最先进的性能。我们还对系统组件进行了详细分析，并进行了根据行为（例如变道与跟随车道）对数据进行分层的实验，以深入了解该领域的挑战。最后，我们提出定性分析，以显示我们方法的其他好处，例如解释输出的能力。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种用于自动驾驶的快速轻量级运动预测系统，结合贝叶斯逆规划框架与学习到的运动剖面，以解决交通场景中道路用户运动预测的多模态性、不确定性及轨迹物理可行性问题。
AI.motivation: 自动驾驶系统需在复杂动态环境中做出安全决策，现有方法常难以有效处理运动预测的多模态性、运动剖面不确定性及轨迹物理可行性等挑战。
AI.method: 基于贝叶斯逆规划框架，整合地图目标提取、经典控制轨迹生成器及轻量级神经网络专家混合模型，通过模块化设计分离性能影响因素并提升结果可解释性。
AI.result: 在NGSIM数据集上达到轨迹误差的最先进水平，通过行为分层实验（如变道与跟车）分析系统组件，并展示输出的可解释性优势。
AI.conclusion: 该系统有效解决了运动预测的多模态性、不确定性及物理可行性问题，在基准测试中表现优异，且具备可解释性，适用于自动驾驶场景。

authors_text: Alekh Agarwal,Tong Zhang
title: Non-Linear Reinforcement Learning in Large Action Spaces: Structural Conditions and Sample-efficiency of Posterior Sampling
title_zh: 大动作空间中的非线性强化学习：后采样的结构条件和样本效率
comment: Fixes an error in the earlier version in the proof of Proposition 13
comments: Fixes an error in the earlier version in the proof of Proposition 13
abstract: Provably sample-efficient Reinforcement Learning (RL) with rich observations and function approximation has witnessed tremendous recent progress, particularly when the underlying function approximators are linear. In this linear regime, computationally and statistically efficient methods exist where the potentially infinite state and action spaces can be captured through a known feature embedding, with the sample complexity scaling with the (intrinsic) dimension of these features. When the action space is finite, significantly more sophisticated results allow non-linear function approximation under appropriate structural constraints on the underlying RL problem, permitting for instance, the learning of good features instead of assuming access to them. In this work, we present the first result for non-linear function approximation which holds for general action spaces under a linear embeddability condition, which generalizes all linear and finite action settings. We design a novel optimistic posterior sampling strategy, TS^3 for such problems, and show worst case sample complexity guarantees that scale with a rank parameter of the RL problem, the linear embedding dimension introduced in this work and standard measures of the function class complexity.
summary: Provably sample-efficient Reinforcement Learning (RL) with rich observations and function approximation has witnessed tremendous recent progress, particularly when the underlying function approximators are linear. In this linear regime, computationally and statistically efficient methods exist where the potentially infinite state and action spaces can be captured through a known feature embedding, with the sample complexity scaling with the (intrinsic) dimension of these features. When the action space is finite, significantly more sophisticated results allow non-linear function approximation under appropriate structural constraints on the underlying RL problem, permitting for instance, the learning of good features instead of assuming access to them. In this work, we present the first result for non-linear function approximation which holds for general action spaces under a linear embeddability condition, which generalizes all linear and finite action settings. We design a novel optimistic posterior sampling strategy, TS^3 for such problems, and show worst case sample complexity guarantees that scale with a rank parameter of the RL problem, the linear embedding dimension introduced in this work and standard measures of the function class complexity.
abstract_zh: 可证明样本效率高的强化学习（RL）具有丰富的观察结果和函数逼近，最近取得了巨大的进展，特别是当底层函数逼近器是线性的时。在这种线性机制中，存在计算和统计上有效的方法，其中可以通过已知的特征嵌入来捕获潜在的无限状态和动作空间，并且样本复杂性随着这些特征的（固有）维度而缩放。当动作空间有限时，显着更复杂的结果允许在底层 RL 问题的适当结构约束下进行非线性函数逼近，例如允许学习良好的特征而不是假设可以访问它们。在这项工作中，我们提出了非线性函数近似的第一个结果，它适用于线性可嵌入性条件下的一般动作空间，它概括了所有线性和有限动作设置。我们针对此类问题设计了一种新颖的乐观后验采样策略 TS^3，并展示了最坏情况样本复杂性保证了 RL 问题的秩参数、本工作中引入的线性嵌入维数以及函数类复杂性的标准度量的扩展。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了在大动作空间中使用非线性函数逼近的强化学习问题，提出了满足线性嵌入条件下的样本效率保证。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在有限动作空间和线性函数逼近下表现良好，但缺乏对大动作空间和非线性逼近的通用理论保证。
AI.method: 设计了一种乐观后验抽样策略TS^3，在线性嵌入条件下处理一般动作空间的非线性函数逼近问题。
AI.result: 证明了样本复杂度与问题秩参数、线性嵌入维度及函数类复杂度指标相关，首次实现了非线性逼近在大动作空间的理论保证。
AI.conclusion: 通过结构化条件与后验抽样结合，本文为大动作空间的非线性强化学习提供了新的理论框架与高效算法。

ai_content.tldr: 本文研究了在大动作空间中使用非线性函数逼近的强化学习问题，提出了满足线性嵌入条件下的样本效率保证。
ai_content.motivation: 现有方法在有限动作空间和线性函数逼近下表现良好，但缺乏对大动作空间和非线性逼近的通用理论保证。

search_text: Non-Linear Reinforcement Learning in Large Action Spaces: Structural Conditions and Sample-efficiency of Posterior Sampling 大动作空间中的非线性强化学习：后采样的结构条件和样本效率 Provably sample-efficient Reinforcement Learning (RL) with rich observations and function approximation has witnessed tremendous recent progress, particularly when the underlying function approximators are linear. In this linear regime, computationally and statistically efficient methods exist where the potentially infinite state and action spaces can be captured through a known feature embedding, with the sample complexity scaling with the (intrinsic) dimension of these features. When the action space is finite, significantly more sophisticated results allow non-linear function approximation under appropriate structural constraints on the underlying RL problem, permitting for instance, the learning of good features instead of assuming access to them. In this work, we present the first result for non-linear function approximation which holds for general action spaces under a linear embeddability condition, which generalizes all linear and finite action settings. We design a novel optimistic posterior sampling strategy, TS^3 for such problems, and show worst case sample complexity guarantees that scale with a rank parameter of the RL problem, the linear embedding dimension introduced in this work and standard measures of the function class complexity. 可证明样本效率高的强化学习（RL）具有丰富的观察结果和函数逼近，最近取得了巨大的进展，特别是当底层函数逼近器是线性的时。在这种线性机制中，存在计算和统计上有效的方法，其中可以通过已知的特征嵌入来捕获潜在的无限状态和动作空间，并且样本复杂性随着这些特征的（固有）维度而缩放。当动作空间有限时，显着更复杂的结果允许在底层 RL 问题的适当结构约束下进行非线性函数逼近，例如允许学习良好的特征而不是假设可以访问它们。在这项工作中，我们提出了非线性函数近似的第一个结果，它适用于线性可嵌入性条件下的一般动作空间，它概括了所有线性和有限动作设置。我们针对此类问题设计了一种新颖的乐观后验采样策略 TS^3，并展示了最坏情况样本复杂性保证了 RL 问题的秩参数、本工作中引入的线性嵌入维数以及函数类复杂性的标准度量的扩展。 本文研究了在大动作空间中使用非线性函数逼近的强化学习问题，提出了满足线性嵌入条件下的样本效率保证。 Alekh Agarwal,Tong Zhang cs.LG,cs.AI

authors_text: Ha-Thanh Nguyen
title: Toward Improving Attentive Neural Networks in Legal Text Processing
title_zh: 改善法律文本处理中的注意力神经网络
abstract: In recent years, thanks to breakthroughs in neural network techniques especially attentive deep learning models, natural language processing has made many impressive achievements. However, automated legal word processing is still a difficult branch of natural language processing. Legal sentences are often long and contain complicated legal terminologies. Hence, models that work well on general documents still face challenges in dealing with legal documents. We have verified the existence of this problem with our experiments in this work. In this dissertation, we selectively present the main achievements in improving attentive neural networks in automatic legal document processing. Language models tend to grow larger and larger, though, without expert knowledge, these models can still fail in domain adaptation, especially for specialized fields like law.
summary: In recent years, thanks to breakthroughs in neural network techniques especially attentive deep learning models, natural language processing has made many impressive achievements. However, automated legal word processing is still a difficult branch of natural language processing. Legal sentences are often long and contain complicated legal terminologies. Hence, models that work well on general documents still face challenges in dealing with legal documents. We have verified the existence of this problem with our experiments in this work. In this dissertation, we selectively present the main achievements in improving attentive neural networks in automatic legal document processing. Language models tend to grow larger and larger, though, without expert knowledge, these models can still fail in domain adaptation, especially for specialized fields like law.
abstract_zh: 近年来，得益于神经网络技术尤其是深度学习模型的突破，自然语言处理取得了许多令人瞩目的成就。然而，自动法律文字处理仍然是自然语言处理的一个困难分支。法律句子通常很长并且包含复杂的法律术语。因此，适用于一般文档的模型在处理法律文档时仍然面临挑战。我们在这项工作中通过实验验证了这个问题的存在。在本论文中，我们有选择地介绍了在自动法律文档处理中改进注意力神经网络的主要成果。语言模型往往会变得越来越大，但是，如果没有专业知识，这些模型仍然可能在领域适应方面失败，特别是对于法律等专业领域。

AI.tldr: 改进注意力神经网络以提升法律文本处理效果
AI.motivation: 法律文本的复杂性和现有模型在领域适应上的不足促使研究改进注意力机制
AI.method: 通过实验验证问题，并提出改进注意力神经网络的特定方法以适应法律文本
AI.result: 验证了现有模型在处理法律文本时的局限性，并展示了改进方法的有效性
AI.conclusion: 改进后的模型在法律文本处理中表现更优，但领域适应仍需结合专家知识

authors_text: Shixing Yu,Tianlong Chen,Jiayi Shen,Huan Yuan,Jianchao Tan,Sen Yang,Ji Liu,Zhangyang Wang
title: Unified Visual Transformer Compression
title_zh: 统一视觉变压器压缩
abstract: Vision transformers (ViTs) have gained popularity recently. Even without customized image operators such as convolutions, ViTs can yield competitive performance when properly trained on massive data. However, the computational overhead of ViTs remains prohibitive, due to stacking multi-head self-attention modules and else. Compared to the vast literature and prevailing success in compressing convolutional neural networks, the study of Vision Transformer compression has also just emerged, and existing works focused on one or two aspects of compression. This paper proposes a unified ViT compression framework that seamlessly assembles three effective techniques: pruning, layer skipping, and knowledge distillation. We formulate a budget-constrained, end-to-end optimization framework, targeting jointly learning model weights, layer-wise pruning ratios/masks, and skip configurations, under a distillation loss. The optimization problem is then solved using the primal-dual algorithm. Experiments are conducted with several ViT variants, e.g. DeiT and T2T-ViT backbones on the ImageNet dataset, and our approach consistently outperforms recent competitors. For example, DeiT-Tiny can be trimmed down to 50\% of the original FLOPs almost without losing accuracy. Codes are available online:~\url{https://github.com/VITA-Group/UVC}.
summary: Vision transformers (ViTs) have gained popularity recently. Even without customized image operators such as convolutions, ViTs can yield competitive performance when properly trained on massive data. However, the computational overhead of ViTs remains prohibitive, due to stacking multi-head self-attention modules and else. Compared to the vast literature and prevailing success in compressing convolutional neural networks, the study of Vision Transformer compression has also just emerged, and existing works focused on one or two aspects of compression. This paper proposes a unified ViT compression framework that seamlessly assembles three effective techniques: pruning, layer skipping, and knowledge distillation. We formulate a budget-constrained, end-to-end optimization framework, targeting jointly learning model weights, layer-wise pruning ratios/masks, and skip configurations, under a distillation loss. The optimization problem is then solved using the primal-dual algorithm. Experiments are conducted with several ViT variants, e.g. DeiT and T2T-ViT backbones on the ImageNet dataset, and our approach consistently outperforms recent competitors. For example, DeiT-Tiny can be trimmed down to 50\% of the original FLOPs almost without losing accuracy. Codes are available online:~\url{https://github.com/VITA-Group/UVC}.
abstract_zh: 视觉变压器（ViT）最近很受欢迎。即使没有定制的图像算子（例如卷积），当对海量数据进行适当训练时，ViT 也可以产生具有竞争力的性能。然而，由于堆叠多头自注意力模块等，ViT 的计算开销仍然令人望而却步。与压缩卷积神经网络方面的大量文献和普遍成功相比，Vision Transformer 压缩的研究也刚刚兴起，现有的工作主要集中在压缩的一两个方面。本文提出了一个统一的 ViT 压缩框架，它无缝地组合了三种有效的技术：剪枝、跳层和知识蒸馏。我们制定了一个预算受限的端到端优化框架，针对蒸馏损失下的联合学习模型权重、分层剪枝比率/掩码和跳过配置。然后使用原对偶算法解决优化问题。使用多种 ViT 变体进行了实验，例如ImageNet 数据集上的 DeiT 和 T2T-ViT 主干，我们的方法始终优于最近的竞争对手。例如，DeiT-Tiny 可以削减到原始 FLOP 的 50%，几乎不会损失准确性。代码可在线获取：~\url{https://github.com/VITA-Group/UVC}。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种统一的视觉Transformer压缩框架，结合了剪枝、层跳过和知识蒸馏三种技术。
AI.motivation: 视觉Transformer（ViT）在大规模数据上表现优异，但计算开销较大，现有压缩方法仅关注单一或两个方面，缺乏统一的解决方案。
AI.method: 本文提出了一种预算约束下的端到端优化框架，联合学习模型权重、逐层剪枝比例/掩码和跳过配置，并采用对偶算法求解优化问题。
AI.result: 在ImageNet数据集上，该方法在多个ViT变体（如DeiT和T2T-ViT）上表现优异，例如DeiT-Tiny的计算量可减少至原来的50%而几乎不损失精度。
AI.conclusion: 本文提出的统一压缩框架在视觉Transformer的压缩任务中表现出色，为未来相关研究提供了有效的解决方案。

authors_text: Valeriia Cherepanova,Steven Reich,Samuel Dooley,Hossein Souri,Micah Goldblum,Tom Goldstein
title: A Deep Dive into Dataset Imbalance and Bias in Face Identification
title_zh: 深入研究人脸识别中的数据集不平衡和偏差
abstract: As the deployment of automated face recognition (FR) systems proliferates, bias in these systems is not just an academic question, but a matter of public concern. Media portrayals often center imbalance as the main source of bias, i.e., that FR models perform worse on images of non-white people or women because these demographic groups are underrepresented in training data. Recent academic research paints a more nuanced picture of this relationship. However, previous studies of data imbalance in FR have focused exclusively on the face verification setting, while the face identification setting has been largely ignored, despite being deployed in sensitive applications such as law enforcement. This is an unfortunate omission, as 'imbalance' is a more complex matter in identification; imbalance may arise in not only the training data, but also the testing data, and furthermore may affect the proportion of identities belonging to each demographic group or the number of images belonging to each identity. In this work, we address this gap in the research by thoroughly exploring the effects of each kind of imbalance possible in face identification, and discuss other factors which may impact bias in this setting.
summary: As the deployment of automated face recognition (FR) systems proliferates, bias in these systems is not just an academic question, but a matter of public concern. Media portrayals often center imbalance as the main source of bias, i.e., that FR models perform worse on images of non-white people or women because these demographic groups are underrepresented in training data. Recent academic research paints a more nuanced picture of this relationship. However, previous studies of data imbalance in FR have focused exclusively on the face verification setting, while the face identification setting has been largely ignored, despite being deployed in sensitive applications such as law enforcement. This is an unfortunate omission, as 'imbalance' is a more complex matter in identification; imbalance may arise in not only the training data, but also the testing data, and furthermore may affect the proportion of identities belonging to each demographic group or the number of images belonging to each identity. In this work, we address this gap in the research by thoroughly exploring the effects of each kind of imbalance possible in face identification, and discuss other factors which may impact bias in this setting.
abstract_zh: 随着自动人脸识别（FR）系统的部署激增，这些系统中的偏见不仅是一个学术问题，而且是一个公众关注的问题。媒体通常将不平衡描述为偏见的主要来源，即 FR 模型在非白人或女性的图像上表现较差，因为这些人口群体在训练数据中代表性不足。最近的学术研究描绘了这种关系的更细致的图景。然而，之前对FR中数据不平衡的研究仅集中在人脸验证设置上，而人脸识别设置尽管部署在执法等敏感应用中，但在很大程度上被忽略了。这是一个不幸的遗漏，因为“不平衡”在识别中是一个更复杂的问题；不平衡不仅可能出现在训练数据中，而且可能出现在测试数据中，并且还可能影响属于每个人口群体的身份比例或属于每个身份的图像数量。在这项工作中，我们通过彻底探索人脸识别中可能存在的各种不平衡的影响来解决研究中的这一空白，并讨论可能影响这种情况下偏见的其他因素。

AI.tldr: 本文深入探讨人脸识别中数据不平衡与偏见的关系，填补了现有研究在识别设置中的空白。
AI.motivation: 现有研究多关注验证设置，而人脸识别在敏感应用中存在更复杂的不平衡问题，需深入分析以解决偏见问题。
AI.method: 通过分析训练和测试数据的不平衡类型及其对不同人口统计群体的影响，结合实验验证不同因素对偏见的作用。
AI.result: 发现识别设置中不平衡不仅源于训练数据，还涉及测试数据及身份分布，不同不平衡类型对偏见的影响各异。
AI.conclusion: 人脸识别中的不平衡问题比验证设置更复杂，需综合考虑数据分布和身份比例等因素以减少偏见。

search_text: A Deep Dive into Dataset Imbalance and Bias in Face Identification 深入研究人脸识别中的数据集不平衡和偏差 As the deployment of automated face recognition (FR) systems proliferates, bias in these systems is not just an academic question, but a matter of public concern. Media portrayals often center imbalance as the main source of bias, i.e., that FR models perform worse on images of non-white people or women because these demographic groups are underrepresented in training data. Recent academic research paints a more nuanced picture of this relationship. However, previous studies of data imbalance in FR have focused exclusively on the face verification setting, while the face identification setting has been largely ignored, despite being deployed in sensitive applications such as law enforcement. This is an unfortunate omission, as 'imbalance' is a more complex matter in identification; imbalance may arise in not only the training data, but also the testing data, and furthermore may affect the proportion of identities belonging to each demographic group or the number of images belonging to each identity. In this work, we address this gap in the research by thoroughly exploring the effects of each kind of imbalance possible in face identification, and discuss other factors which may impact bias in this setting. 随着自动人脸识别（FR）系统的部署激增，这些系统中的偏见不仅是一个学术问题，而且是一个公众关注的问题。媒体通常将不平衡描述为偏见的主要来源，即 FR 模型在非白人或女性的图像上表现较差，因为这些人口群体在训练数据中代表性不足。最近的学术研究描绘了这种关系的更细致的图景。然而，之前对FR中数据不平衡的研究仅集中在人脸验证设置上，而人脸识别设置尽管部署在执法等敏感应用中，但在很大程度上被忽略了。这是一个不幸的遗漏，因为“不平衡”在识别中是一个更复杂的问题；不平衡不仅可能出现在训练数据中，而且可能出现在测试数据中，并且还可能影响属于每个人口群体的身份比例或属于每个身份的图像数量。在这项工作中，我们通过彻底探索人脸识别中可能存在的各种不平衡的影响来解决研究中的这一空白，并讨论可能影响这种情况下偏见的其他因素。 本文深入探讨人脸识别中数据不平衡与偏见的关系，填补了现有研究在识别设置中的空白。 Valeriia Cherepanova,Steven Reich,Samuel Dooley,Hossein Souri,Micah Goldblum,Tom Goldstein cs.CV,cs.LG

authors_text: shuvrangshu Jana,Rudrashis Majumder,Aashay Bhise,Nobin Paul,Stuti Garg,Debasish Ghose
title: Development of Decision Support System for Effective COVID-19 Management
title_zh: 开发有效管理 COVID-19 的决策支持系统
comment: 5th world Congress on Disaster Management, IIT Delhi, New Delhi, India
comments: 5th world Congress on Disaster Management, IIT Delhi, New Delhi, India
abstract: This paper discusses a Decision Support System (DSS) for cases prediction, allocation of resources, and lockdown management for managing COVID-19 at different levels of a government authority. Algorithms incorporated in the DSS are based on a data-driven modeling approach and independent of physical parameters of the region, and hence the proposed DSS is applicable to any area. Based on predicted active cases, the demand of lower-level units and total availability, allocation, and lockdown decision is made. A MATLAB-based GUI is developed based on the proposed DSS and could be implemented by the local authority.
summary: This paper discusses a Decision Support System (DSS) for cases prediction, allocation of resources, and lockdown management for managing COVID-19 at different levels of a government authority. Algorithms incorporated in the DSS are based on a data-driven modeling approach and independent of physical parameters of the region, and hence the proposed DSS is applicable to any area. Based on predicted active cases, the demand of lower-level units and total availability, allocation, and lockdown decision is made. A MATLAB-based GUI is developed based on the proposed DSS and could be implemented by the local authority.
abstract_zh: 本文讨论了用于病例预测、资源分配和锁定管理的决策支持系统 (DSS)，用于在不同级别的政府机构管理 COVID-19。 DSS 中包含的算法基于数据驱动的建模方法，并且与区域的物理参数无关，因此所提出的 DSS 适用于任何区域。根据预测的活跃案例，做出较低级别单元的需求以及总可用性、分配和锁定决策。基于 MATLAB 的 GUI 是根据拟议的 DSS 开发的，可由地方当局实施。

AI.tldr: 本文开发了一个适用于不同政府层级的决策支持系统（DSS），用于预测病例、分配资源及管理封锁措施。
AI.motivation: 疫情管理需要高效决策工具，传统方法依赖物理参数且缺乏灵活性，需开发通用型数据驱动系统以适应不同区域需求。
AI.method: 基于数据驱动建模方法，结合MATLAB开发图形用户界面（GUI），实现病例预测、资源分配及封锁决策的自动化。
AI.result: 成功构建可实施的MATLAB GUI系统，支持地方当局根据预测数据动态调整资源分配和封锁策略。
AI.conclusion: 该系统因不依赖区域物理参数而具有广泛适用性，可有效提升政府对疫情防控的决策效率与资源利用率。

authors_text: Mingjie Wang,Jun Zhou,Hao Cai,Minglun Gong
title: CrowdMLP: Weakly-Supervised Crowd Counting via Multi-Granularity MLP
title_zh: CrowdMLP：通过多粒度 MLP 进行弱监督人群计数
abstract: Existing state-of-the-art crowd counting algorithms rely excessively on location-level annotations, which are burdensome to acquire. When only count-level (weak) supervisory signals are available, it is arduous and error-prone to regress total counts due to the lack of explicit spatial constraints. To address this issue, a novel and efficient counter (referred to as CrowdMLP) is presented, which probes into modelling global dependencies of embeddings and regressing total counts by devising a multi-granularity MLP regressor. In specific, a locally-focused pre-trained frontend is cascaded to extract crude feature maps with intrinsic spatial cues, which prevent the model from collapsing into trivial outcomes. The crude embeddings, along with raw crowd scenes, are tokenized at different granularity levels. The multi-granularity MLP then proceeds to mix tokens at the dimensions of cardinality, channel, and spatial for mining global information. An effective proxy task, namely Split-Counting, is also proposed to evade the barrier of limited samples and the shortage of spatial hints in a self-supervised manner. Extensive experiments demonstrate that CrowdMLP significantly outperforms existing weakly-supervised counting algorithms and performs on par with state-of-the-art location-level supervised approaches.
summary: Existing state-of-the-art crowd counting algorithms rely excessively on location-level annotations, which are burdensome to acquire. When only count-level (weak) supervisory signals are available, it is arduous and error-prone to regress total counts due to the lack of explicit spatial constraints. To address this issue, a novel and efficient counter (referred to as CrowdMLP) is presented, which probes into modelling global dependencies of embeddings and regressing total counts by devising a multi-granularity MLP regressor. In specific, a locally-focused pre-trained frontend is cascaded to extract crude feature maps with intrinsic spatial cues, which prevent the model from collapsing into trivial outcomes. The crude embeddings, along with raw crowd scenes, are tokenized at different granularity levels. The multi-granularity MLP then proceeds to mix tokens at the dimensions of cardinality, channel, and spatial for mining global information. An effective proxy task, namely Split-Counting, is also proposed to evade the barrier of limited samples and the shortage of spatial hints in a self-supervised manner. Extensive experiments demonstrate that CrowdMLP significantly outperforms existing weakly-supervised counting algorithms and performs on par with state-of-the-art location-level supervised approaches.
abstract_zh: 现有最先进的人群计数算法过度依赖位置级注释，而获取这些注释非常繁琐。当只有计数级（弱）监督信号可用时，由于缺乏明确的空间约束，对总计数进行回归是困难且容易出错的。为了解决这个问题，提出了一种新颖且高效的计数器（称为 CrowdMLP），它通过设计多粒度 MLP 回归器来探讨嵌入的全局依赖性建模和回归总计数。具体来说，一个以本地为中心的预训练前端被级联，以提取具有内在空间线索的原始特征图，这可以防止模型崩溃为微不足道的结果。粗略的嵌入以及原始人群场景以不同的粒度级别进行标记。然后，多粒度 MLP 继续在基数、通道和空间维度上混合令牌，以挖掘全局信息。还提出了一种有效的代理任务，即分割计数，以自监督的方式规避样本有限和空间提示短缺的障碍。大量实验表明，CrowdMLP 的性能显着优于现有的弱监督计数算法，并且与最先进的位置级监督方法相当。

AI.tldr: 提出一种弱监督人群计数方法CrowdMLP，通过多粒度MLP回归器建模全局依赖关系以回归总数。
AI.motivation: 现有方法过度依赖难以获取的位置级标注，而弱监督信号下因缺乏空间约束导致计数回归困难。
AI.method: 设计预训练前端提取空间特征，结合多粒度MLP在不同维度混合特征，并引入Split-Counting自监督任务缓解样本不足问题。
AI.result: CrowdMLP在弱监督场景下显著优于现有方法，性能接近最先进的位置级监督算法。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过多粒度特征建模和自监督任务有效解决了弱监督人群计数中的关键挑战。

The multi-granularity MLP then proceeds to mix tokens at the dimensions of cardinality, channel, and spatial for mining global information. An effective proxy task, namely Split-Counting, is also proposed to evade the barrier of limited samples and the shortage of spatial hints in a self-supervised manner. Extensive experiments demonstrate that CrowdMLP significantly outperforms existing weakly-supervised counting algorithms and performs on par with state-of-the-art location-level supervised approaches. 现有最先进的人群计数算法过度依赖位置级注释，而获取这些注释非常繁琐。当只有计数级（弱）监督信号可用时，由于缺乏明确的空间约束，对总计数进行回归是困难且容易出错的。为了解决这个问题，提出了一种新颖且高效的计数器（称为 CrowdMLP），它通过设计多粒度 MLP 回归器来探讨嵌入的全局依赖性建模和回归总计数。具体来说，一个以本地为中心的预训练前端被级联，以提取具有内在空间线索的原始特征图，这可以防止模型崩溃为微不足道的结果。粗略的嵌入以及原始人群场景以不同的粒度级别进行标记。然后，多粒度 MLP 继续在基数、通道和空间维度上混合令牌，以挖掘全局信息。还提出了一种有效的代理任务，即分割计数，以自监督的方式规避样本有限和空间提示短缺的障碍。大量实验表明，CrowdMLP 的性能显着优于现有的弱监督计数算法，并且与最先进的位置级监督方法相当。 提出一种弱监督人群计数方法CrowdMLP，通过多粒度MLP回归器建模全局依赖关系以回归总数。 Mingjie Wang,Jun Zhou,Hao Cai,Minglun Gong cs.CV,cs.AI

authors_text: Tasnia Ashrafi Heya,Abdul Serwadda,Isaac Griswold-Steiner,Richard Matovu
title: A Wearables-Driven Attack on Examination Proctoring
title_zh: 可穿戴设备驱动的考试监考攻击
comment: Published in 2021 18th International Conference on Privacy, Security and Trust (PST)
comments: Published in 2021 18th International Conference on Privacy, Security and Trust (PST)
abstract: Multiple choice questions are at the heart of many standardized tests and examinations at academic institutions allover the world. In this paper, we argue that recent advancements in sensing and human-computer interaction expose these types of questions to highly effective attacks that today's proctor's are simply not equipped to detect. We design one such attack based on a protocol of carefully orchestrated wrist movements combined with haptic and visual feedback mechanisms designed for stealthiness. The attack is done through collaboration between a knowledgeable student (i.e., a mercenary) and a weak student (i.e., the beneficiary) who depends on the mercenary for solutions. Through a combination of experiments and theoretical modeling, we show the attack to be highly effective. The paper makes the case for an outright ban on all tech gadgets inside examination rooms, irrespective of whether their usage appears benign to the plain eye.
summary: Multiple choice questions are at the heart of many standardized tests and examinations at academic institutions allover the world. In this paper, we argue that recent advancements in sensing and human-computer interaction expose these types of questions to highly effective attacks that today's proctor's are simply not equipped to detect. We design one such attack based on a protocol of carefully orchestrated wrist movements combined with haptic and visual feedback mechanisms designed for stealthiness. The attack is done through collaboration between a knowledgeable student (i.e., a mercenary) and a weak student (i.e., the beneficiary) who depends on the mercenary for solutions. Through a combination of experiments and theoretical modeling, we show the attack to be highly effective. The paper makes the case for an outright ban on all tech gadgets inside examination rooms, irrespective of whether their usage appears benign to the plain eye.
abstract_zh: 多项选择题是世界各地学术机构许多标准化测试和考试的核心。在本文中，我们认为传感和人机交互方面的最新进展使这些类型的问题面临高效的攻击，而当今的监考人员根本没有能力检测到这些攻击。我们根据精心策划的手腕运动协议以及专为隐秘设计的触觉和视觉反馈机制设计了一种此类攻击。攻击是通过知识渊博的学生（即雇佣兵）和依赖雇佣兵寻求解决方案的弱学生（即受益人）之间的合作来完成的。通过实验和理论建模的结合，我们证明了这种攻击是非常有效的。这篇论文提出了彻底禁止考场内使用所有科技产品的理由，无论它们的使用在普通人看来是否是良性的。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于可穿戴设备的考试监考攻击方法，并主张全面禁止考试室内所有电子设备。
AI.motivation: 现有监考手段无法检测新型传感和人机交互技术带来的作弊攻击，需寻找有效防御方案。
AI.method: 设计结合手腕动作与触觉/视觉反馈的隐蔽攻击协议，通过雇佣兵与受益者协作实施作弊。
AI.result: 实验与理论模型验证攻击有效性，证明现有监考系统无法识别此类新型作弊手段。
AI.conclusion: 应全面禁止考试室内所有电子设备，无论其表面用途是否合法，以防止技术驱动的作弊攻击。

authors_text: Jeya Maria Jose Valanarasu,He Zhang,Jianming Zhang,Yilin Wang,Zhe Lin,Jose Echevarria,Yinglan Ma,Zijun Wei,Kalyan Sunkavalli,Vishal M. Patel
title: Interactive Portrait Harmonization
title_zh: 交互式肖像协调
abstract: Current image harmonization methods consider the entire background as the guidance for harmonization. However, this may limit the capability for user to choose any specific object/person in the background to guide the harmonization. To enable flexible interaction between user and harmonization, we introduce interactive harmonization, a new setting where the harmonization is performed with respect to a selected \emph{region} in the reference image instead of the entire background. A new flexible framework that allows users to pick certain regions of the background image and use it to guide the harmonization is proposed. Inspired by professional portrait harmonization users, we also introduce a new luminance matching loss to optimally match the color/luminance conditions between the composite foreground and select reference region. This framework provides more control to the image harmonization pipeline achieving visually pleasing portrait edits. Furthermore, we also introduce a new dataset carefully curated for validating portrait harmonization. Extensive experiments on both synthetic and real-world datasets show that the proposed approach is efficient and robust compared to previous harmonization baselines, especially for portraits. Project Webpage at \href{https://jeya-maria-jose.github.io/IPH-web/}{https://jeya-maria-jose.github.io/IPH-web/}
summary: Current image harmonization methods consider the entire background as the guidance for harmonization. However, this may limit the capability for user to choose any specific object/person in the background to guide the harmonization. To enable flexible interaction between user and harmonization, we introduce interactive harmonization, a new setting where the harmonization is performed with respect to a selected \emph{region} in the reference image instead of the entire background. A new flexible framework that allows users to pick certain regions of the background image and use it to guide the harmonization is proposed. Inspired by professional portrait harmonization users, we also introduce a new luminance matching loss to optimally match the color/luminance conditions between the composite foreground and select reference region. This framework provides more control to the image harmonization pipeline achieving visually pleasing portrait edits. Furthermore, we also introduce a new dataset carefully curated for validating portrait harmonization. Extensive experiments on both synthetic and real-world datasets show that the proposed approach is efficient and robust compared to previous harmonization baselines, especially for portraits. Project Webpage at \href{https://jeya-maria-jose.github.io/IPH-web/}{https://jeya-maria-jose.github.io/IPH-web/}
abstract_zh: 当前的图像协调方法将整个背景视为协调的指导。然而，这可能限制用户选择背景中的任何特定对象/人来指导协调的能力。为了实现用户与协调之间的灵活交互，我们引入了交互式协调，这是一种新设置，其中协调是针对参考图像中选定的\emph{区域}而不是整个背景执行的。提出了一种新的灵活框架，允许用户选择背景图像的某些区域并用它来指导协调。受专业肖像协调用户的启发，我们还引入了新的亮度匹配损失，以最佳地匹配合成前景和选择参考区域之间的颜色/亮度条件。该框架为图像协调管道提供了更多控制，实现视觉上令人愉悦的肖像编辑。此外，我们还引入了一个精心策划的新数据集，用于验证肖像协调性。对合成数据集和真实数据集的大量实验表明，与之前的协调基线相比，所提出的方法是高效且稳健的，尤其是对于肖像。项目网页位于 \href{https://jeya-maria-jose.github.io/IPH-web/}{https://jeya-maria-jose.github.io/IPH-web/}

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种交互式人像调和方法，允许用户选择参考图像中的特定区域来指导调和过程。
AI.motivation: 当前图像调和方法通常使用整个背景作为指导，这限制了用户选择特定对象或人进行调和的灵活性。
AI.method: 引入交互式调和设置，允许用户选择参考图像中的特定区域进行调和，并提出一种新的亮度匹配损失函数以优化颜色和亮度条件。
AI.result: 在合成和真实数据集上的实验表明，该方法相比现有方法更高效且鲁棒，特别是在人像调和方面。
AI.conclusion: 该框架提供了更精细的控制，实现了视觉上令人满意的图像调和效果，并引入了一个新的数据集用于验证人像调和。

authors_text: Wasifur Rahman,Masum Hasan,Md Saiful Islam,Titilayo Olubajo,Jeet Thaker,Abdelrahman Abdelkader,Phillip Yang,Tetsuo Ashizawa,Ehsan Hoque
title: Auto-Gait: Automatic Ataxia Risk Assessment with Computer Vision on Gait Task Videos
title_zh: 自动步态：利用计算机视觉对步态任务视频进行自动共济失调风险评估
abstract: In this paper, we investigated whether we can 1) detect participants with ataxia-specific gait characteristics (risk-prediction), and 2) assess severity of ataxia from gait (severity-assessment) using computer vision. We created a dataset of 155 videos from 89 participants, 24 controls and 65 diagnosed with (or are pre-manifest) spinocerebellar ataxias (SCAs), performing the gait task of the Scale for the Assessment and Rating of Ataxia (SARA) from 11 medical sites located in 8 different states across the United States. We develop a computer vision pipeline to detect, track, and separate out the participants from their surroundings and construct several features from their body pose coordinates to capture gait characteristics like step width, step length, swing, stability, speed, etc. Our risk-prediction model achieves 83.06% accuracy and an 80.23% F1 score. Similarly, our severity-assessment model achieves a mean absolute error (MAE) score of 0.6225 and a Pearson's correlation coefficient score of 0.7268. Our models still performed competitively when evaluated on data from sites not used during training. Furthermore, through feature importance analysis, we found that our models associate wider steps, decreased walking speed, and increased instability with greater ataxia severity, which is consistent with previously established clinical knowledge. Our models create possibilities for remote ataxia assessment in non-clinical settings in the future, which could significantly improve accessibility of ataxia care. Furthermore, our underlying dataset was assembled from a geographically diverse cohort, highlighting its potential to further increase equity. The code used in this study is open to the public, and the anonymized body pose landmark dataset is also available upon request.
summary: In this paper, we investigated whether we can 1) detect participants with ataxia-specific gait characteristics (risk-prediction), and 2) assess severity of ataxia from gait (severity-assessment) using computer vision. We created a dataset of 155 videos from 89 participants, 24 controls and 65 diagnosed with (or are pre-manifest) spinocerebellar ataxias (SCAs), performing the gait task of the Scale for the Assessment and Rating of Ataxia (SARA) from 11 medical sites located in 8 different states across the United States. We develop a computer vision pipeline to detect, track, and separate out the participants from their surroundings and construct several features from their body pose coordinates to capture gait characteristics like step width, step length, swing, stability, speed, etc. Our risk-prediction model achieves 83.06% accuracy and an 80.23% F1 score. Similarly, our severity-assessment model achieves a mean absolute error (MAE) score of 0.6225 and a Pearson's correlation coefficient score of 0.7268. Our models still performed competitively when evaluated on data from sites not used during training. Furthermore, through feature importance analysis, we found that our models associate wider steps, decreased walking speed, and increased instability with greater ataxia severity, which is consistent with previously established clinical knowledge. Our models create possibilities for remote ataxia assessment in non-clinical settings in the future, which could significantly improve accessibility of ataxia care. Furthermore, our underlying dataset was assembled from a geographically diverse cohort, highlighting its potential to further increase equity. The code used in this study is open to the public, and the anonymized body pose landmark dataset is also available upon request.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们研究了是否可以 1）检测具有共济失调特异性步态特征的参与者（风险预测），2）使用计算机视觉从步态评估共济失调的严重程度（严重程度评估）。我们创建了一个包含 155 个视频的数据集，其中包括 89 名参与者、24 名对照者和 65 名被诊断患有（或已确诊）脊髓小脑共济失调 (SCA) 的患者，并在美国 8 个不同州的 11 个医疗站点执行共济失调评估和评级量表 (SARA) 的步态任务。我们开发了一个计算机视觉管道来检测、跟踪参与者并将其与周围环境分开，并从他们的身体姿势坐标构建多个特征来捕获步态特征，如步宽、步长、摆动、稳定性、速度等。我们的风险预测模型实现了 83.06% 的准确率和 80.23% 的 F1 分数。同样，我们的严重性评估模型的平均绝对误差 (MAE) 得分为 0.6225，皮尔逊相关系数得分为 0.7268。当对训练期间未使用的站点的数据进行评估时，我们的模型仍然具有竞争力。此外，通过特征重要性分析，我们发现我们的模型将更宽的步数、降低的步行速度和增加的不稳定性与共济失调的严重程度联系起来，这与之前建立的临床知识一致。我们的模型为未来在非临床环境中进行远程共济失调评估创造了可能性，这可以显着提高共济失调护理的可及性。此外，我们的基础数据集是从地理上不同的群体中收集而来的，凸显了其进一步增加公平性的潜力。本研究中使用的代码向公众开放，并且还可根据要求提供匿名身体姿势地标数据集。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于计算机视觉的自动评估共济失调风险及严重程度的方法，通过分析步态任务视频中的步态特征实现。
AI.motivation: 旨在通过非临床环境下的远程评估技术提升共济失调患者的护理可及性，并利用地理多样化数据集促进医疗公平性。
AI.method: 构建包含155个视频的多中心数据集，开发计算机视觉流水线进行人体姿态追踪与特征提取（如步宽、步速、稳定性），训练风险预测与严重程度评估模型。
AI.result: 风险预测模型达到83.06%准确率与80.23% F1分数，严重程度评估模型MAE为0.6225且皮尔逊相关系数达0.7268，模型在跨中心数据上表现稳定，特征分析验证临床关联性。
AI.conclusion: 模型为远程共济失调评估提供可能性，开放的数据集与代码有助于推动该领域研究，地理多样性数据增强结果普适性。

search_text: Auto-Gait: Automatic Ataxia Risk Assessment with Computer Vision on Gait Task Videos 自动步态：利用计算机视觉对步态任务视频进行自动共济失调风险评估 In this paper, we investigated whether we can 1) detect participants with ataxia-specific gait characteristics (risk-prediction), and 2) assess severity of ataxia from gait (severity-assessment) using computer vision. We created a dataset of 155 videos from 89 participants, 24 controls and 65 diagnosed with (or are pre-manifest) spinocerebellar ataxias (SCAs), performing the gait task of the Scale for the Assessment and Rating of Ataxia (SARA) from 11 medical sites located in 8 different states across the United States. We develop a computer vision pipeline to detect, track, and separate out the participants from their surroundings and construct several features from their body pose coordinates to capture gait characteristics like step width, step length, swing, stability, speed, etc. Our risk-prediction model achieves 83.06% accuracy and an 80.23% F1 score. Similarly, our severity-assessment model achieves a mean absolute error (MAE) score of 0.6225 and a Pearson's correlation coefficient score of 0.7268. Our models still performed competitively when evaluated on data from sites not used during training. Furthermore, through feature importance analysis, we found that our models associate wider steps, decreased walking speed, and increased instability with greater ataxia severity, which is consistent with previously established clinical knowledge. Our models create possibilities for remote ataxia assessment in non-clinical settings in the future, which could significantly improve accessibility of ataxia care. Furthermore, our underlying dataset was assembled from a geographically diverse cohort, highlighting its potential to further increase equity. The code used in this study is open to the public, and the anonymized body pose landmark dataset is also available upon request. 在本文中，我们研究了是否可以 1）检测具有共济失调特异性步态特征的参与者（风险预测），2）使用计算机视觉从步态评估共济失调的严重程度（严重程度评估）。我们创建了一个包含 155 个视频的数据集，其中包括 89 名参与者、24 名对照者和 65 名被诊断患有（或已确诊）脊髓小脑共济失调 (SCA) 的患者，并在美国 8 个不同州的 11 个医疗站点执行共济失调评估和评级量表 (SARA) 的步态任务。我们开发了一个计算机视觉管道来检测、跟踪参与者并将其与周围环境分开，并从他们的身体姿势坐标构建多个特征来捕获步态特征，如步宽、步长、摆动、稳定性、速度等。我们的风险预测模型实现了 83.06% 的准确率和 80.23% 的 F1 分数。同样，我们的严重性评估模型的平均绝对误差 (MAE) 得分为 0.6225，皮尔逊相关系数得分为 0.7268。当对训练期间未使用的站点的数据进行评估时，我们的模型仍然具有竞争力。此外，通过特征重要性分析，我们发现我们的模型将更宽的步数、降低的步行速度和增加的不稳定性与共济失调的严重程度联系起来，这与之前建立的临床知识一致。我们的模型为未来在非临床环境中进行远程共济失调评估创造了可能性，这可以显着提高共济失调护理的可及性。此外，我们的基础数据集是从地理上不同的群体中收集而来的，凸显了其进一步增加公平性的潜力。本研究中使用的代码向公众开放，并且还可根据要求提供匿名身体姿势地标数据集。 本文提出了一种基于计算机视觉的自动评估共济失调风险及严重程度的方法，通过分析步态任务视频中的步态特征实现。 Wasifur Rahman,Masum Hasan,Md Saiful Islam,Titilayo Olubajo,Jeet Thaker,Abdelrahman Abdelkader,Phillip Yang,Tetsuo Ashizawa,Ehsan Hoque cs.CV,cs.LG
